Mod.Name: Double Enemies
Mod.Description: Duplicates most enemies in the game, and shares hp between duplicate bosses.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 复制游戏中的大部分敌人，并使复制的BOSS共享生命值。

Mod.Name: Keep lifeblood on bench
Mod.Description: Keeps your lifeblood when sitting on a bench, useful to not accidentally kill your lifeblood stack on P5.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在长椅上坐下时保留你的生命血，有助于避免在神居第五门中意外消耗掉生命血堆叠。

Mod.Name: No More Shards
Mod.Description: A simple mod that makes every mask shard and vessel fragment grant you a full mask or vessel respectively.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个简单的模组，让每个面具碎片和容器碎片分别直接给予你一个完整的面具或容器。

Mod.Name: EnemiesFightingEachOther
Mod.Description: Allows the player to spawn in Gruz Mother and Hive Knight and have them fight each other
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许玩家生成格鲁兹之母和蜂巢骑士，让它们互相战斗。

Mod.Name: VengeflyBombardier
Mod.Description: VengeflyBombardier is a Hollow Knight mod that turns the Vengefly King into a much more aggressive boss encounter.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 复仇蝇轰炸者是一个《空洞骑士》模组，它将复仇蝇之王转变为更具攻击性的BOSS战斗。

Mod.Name: BossLib
Mod.Description: Makes creating bosses easier. Does nothing on its own.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让创建BOSS变得更加容易。本身不提供任何功能。

Mod.Name: Lego Power Bricks
Mod.Description: Adds various of the iconic Red Lego Power Bricks to Hollow Knight, in the form of free charms. Currently requires Debug to give yourself the charms.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 向《空洞骑士》中添加各种标志性的红色乐高力量砖块，以免费护符的形式呈现。目前需要调试模组来为自己添加这些护符。

Mod.Name: LieButton
Mod.Description: A simple mod for Hollow Knight. Press a certain customizable key to lie down or get up, like a switch.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个简单的《空洞骑士》模组。按下某个可自定义的按键即可像开关一样躺下或起身。

Mod.Name: Hollow Knight ACTS
Mod.Description: A mod which adds SilkSongs ACT system to hk. Act positions based of Singbuzzordenethcut video on yt.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个将《丝之歌》的ACT系统添加到《空洞骑士》中的模组。ACT位置基于YouTube上Singbuzzordenethcut的视频。

Mod.Name: HKTags
Mod.Description: A library mod that allows you to set n' get tags and attributes
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个库模组，允许你设置和获取标签与属性

Mod.Name: Lifeblood
Mod.Description: Simple lightweight library mod
Mod.DescriptionCN: 简单的轻量级库模组

Mod.Name: Master
Mod.Description: Challenge mod based of a terraria mod of the same name
Mod.DescriptionCN: 基于同名《泰拉瑞亚》模组的挑战模组

Mod.Name: Broken Nail
Mod.Description: Adds a new save mode to hk for the Broken Nail challenge
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为《空洞骑士》新增一种用于破碎骨钉挑战的存档模式

Mod.Name: Vampire Knight
Mod.Description: A.. BLOODSUCKING will!
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个……吸血的意志！

Mod.Name: BlueSR_OST
Mod.Description: Replaces the Sound Tracks in Greenpath, Fungal Wastes and Sealed Vessel fight with BlueSR's version.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将苍绿之径、真菌荒地以及封印容器战斗中的原声音乐替换为BlueSR的版本。

Mod.Name: Ado Death Scream
Mod.Description: Plays Ado's scream when the Knight dies.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 当骑士死亡时播放Ado的尖叫声。

Mod.Name: DeVect
Mod.Description: DeVect, titled 骨杖寂骑人 in Chinese, is a Hollow Knight mod that brings Defect-style orb gameplay from Slay the Spire into the Knight's moveset.
Mod.DescriptionCN: DeVect，中文名为“骨杖寂骑人”，是一款将《杀戮尖塔》中故障机器人风格的球体玩法融入骑士动作集的《空洞骑士》模组。

Mod.Name: ReplayTimerMod
Mod.Description: Records your best times through each room and plays it back as a ghost on your next attempt.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 记录你在每个房间的最佳通关时间，并在下次尝试时以幽灵形式回放。

Mod.Name: StubbornKnight
Mod.Description: StubbornKnight is a stubborn knight mod. The Knight's mind is always fixated on one direction; you can only attack in the direction it desires.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 固执骑士是一个固执的骑士模组。骑士的思维始终固定在一个方向上；你只能朝它想要的方向攻击。

Mod.Name: MossBeast
Mod.Description: MossBeast is a complete port of The Beast boss fight from The Binding of Isaac to Hollow Knight.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 苔藓野兽是将《以撒的结合》中的BOSS“野兽”完整移植到《空洞骑士》中的模组。

Mod.Name: StartingNotches
Mod.Description: Lets you play with an adjustable amount of extra Charm Notches, default starts at 2.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你以可调整数量的额外护符槽位开始游戏，默认起始为2个。

Mod.Name: EasierGeoEconomy
Mod.Description: Allows you to multiply the amount gotten per geo piece. Also includes an option to not lose geo upon death.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你倍增每个吉欧碎片获得的金额。还包含一个死亡时不丢失吉欧的选项。

Mod.Name: PantheonArchitect
Mod.Description: Design and play custom Pantheon 5 lineups in Hollow Knight! Create your perfect boss gauntlet with any bosses in any order, then share your creations with friends using simple codes.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在《空洞骑士》中设计和游玩自定义的万神殿第五门阵容！用任意BOSS以任意顺序创建你完美的BOSS连战，然后通过简单的代码与朋友分享你的创作。

Mod.Name: HuKing
Mod.Description: A modboss of Elder Ghost Hu
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个虫长老胡的模组BOSS

Mod.Name: Mythril Soul
Mod.Description: Adds a new gamemode to Hollow Knight with permadeath expanded to dreams and pausing disabled at or below two masks (harder steel soul).
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为《空洞骑士》增加一种新的游戏模式，在该模式下，永久死亡机制扩展至梦境，且当面具数量为两个或以下时暂停功能被禁用（更难的钢铁之魂模式）。

Mod.Name: U-tils
Mod.Description: Utilities by and for U-tale
Mod.DescriptionCN: 由U-tale制作和使用的实用工具

Mod.Name: CharmReValance
Mod.Description: Charm and ability overhaul and customization
Mod.DescriptionCN: 护符与能力的全面重制与自定义

Mod.Name: DamageValuesRewritten
Mod.Description: Display damage values when enemies suffer damage
Mod.DescriptionCN: 当敌人受到伤害时显示伤害数值

Mod.Name: MyHK
Mod.Description: An assisting mod for HK that can improve the gaming experience significantly
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于《空洞骑士》的辅助模组，能够显著提升游戏体验

Mod.Name: Charm Editor
Mod.Description: This mod allows you to change charm notches and dashmaster
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组允许你更改护符槽位和冲刺大师

Mod.Name: Limitations
Mod.Description: Create none endless limitations
Mod.DescriptionCN: 创建非无尽的限制

Mod.Name: OnlyBosses
Mod.Description: OnlyBosses is an alternative to TheHuntIsOn enemy module (which removes basic enemies), but since it got removed this mod is here.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 仅BOSS是TheHuntIsOn敌人模块（移除基础敌人）的替代方案，但由于该模块已被移除，因此有了这个模组。

Mod.Name: GPZPractice
Mod.Description: This mod allows you config spawning of Zotelings.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组允许你配置左特幼虫的生成。

Mod.Name: FrameLimiter
Mod.Description: Can limit fps to whatever you like (can be usefull for frame specific skips)
Mod.DescriptionCN: 可以将帧率限制为你想要的任何数值（对于特定帧数的跳过操作可能很有用）。

Mod.Name: Faction Elimination
Mod.Description: A custom gamemode for HKMP where teams collect upgrades and fight each other.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为空洞骑士多人联机设计的自定义游戏模式，队伍收集升级并相互战斗。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/aef85351d39a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/6e10556c8b7a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/4be9d1ccef2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c2e063c586a4; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a197fe50f247; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/09af12e1cd3c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c5e48932cbdc; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be
Mod.AllDependencies: Charm Changer; SFCore; WavLib; Satchel; HKMirror; MenuChanger; ItemChanger; TheHuntIsOn; HKMP; KorzUtils; HkmpPouch

Mod.Name: Shared Health
Mod.Description: A HKMP addon to synchronize damage and healing across teams.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个空洞骑士多人联机插件，用于同步队伍间的伤害与治疗。

Mod.Name: SkinBenchRoulette
Mod.Description: Randomizes your Custom Knight skin every time you sit on a bench! Automatically detects your downloaded skins.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 每次坐在长椅上时，随机切换你的自定义骑士皮肤！自动检测你已下载的皮肤。

Mod.Name: Wrong Gravity
Mod.Description: Hallownest? Hɐlloʍuǝsʇ!
Mod.DescriptionCN: 圣巢？Hɐlloʍuǝsʇ！

Mod.Name: Uumuu Hack
Mod.Description: This mod would make Uumuu only attack for once before Quirrel pops its shield from the second cycle on.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组会让乌姆在第二次循环及之后，每次奎若打破其护盾前只攻击一次。

Mod.Name: Quasar Radiance
Mod.Description: A version of Any Radiance 3.0 that's heavily modified to be more fun and enjoyable by casual players while still providing some level of challenge. Very unique fight that's not impossibly hard like the real thing. The mod is meant to be played with a 300 FPS cap so if you play on lower or higher it's gonna be harder or easier than intended.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 这是Any辐光3.0的一个版本，经过大幅修改，使其对休闲玩家来说更有趣、更愉快，同时仍保留一定挑战性。这是一场非常独特的战斗，不像原版那样难到不可能。该模组建议在300帧上限下游玩，因此如果你在更低或更高的帧率下玩，难度会比预期更高或更低。

Mod.Name: ScreenShakeService
Mod.Description: Removes screen shake: Screen Shake Service simply supports slashing Scooped Swordsman's (Hollow Knight's) superfluous screen shake since said shaking stimulates some souls' squeamishness.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 移除屏幕震动：屏幕震动服务简单地支持削减空洞骑士多余的屏幕震动，因为该震动会刺激某些灵魂的反感。

Mod.Name: Bonfire
Mod.Description: A level-up system in Hollow Knight for a more realistic Dark Souls experience (a well-known Hollow Knight ripoff).
Mod.DescriptionCN: 《空洞骑士》中的等级提升系统，带来更真实的《黑暗之魂》体验（一款知名的《空洞骑士》仿作）。

Mod.Name: Lightbringer
Mod.Description: Major gameplay overhaul: fight your way through Hallownest with a lance of light, brand new charms and radiant spells to seek the binding light that plagues our dreams.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 重大玩法改动：手持光之长枪，携带全新护符与辐光法术，在圣巢中杀出一条血路，追寻那困扰我们梦境的束缚之光。

Mod.Name: Exaltation
Mod.Description: Implements the scrapped mechanic of "charm glorification": empower your charms by progressing through Godhome.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 实现了被废弃的“护符升华”机制：通过在神居中的进度来强化你的护符。

Mod.Name: Pale Shadow
Mod.Description: Homemade Pure Vessel boss mod.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 自制纯粹容器 BOSS 模组。

Mod.Name: INFINITY
Mod.Description: A pure vessel boss mod.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个纯粹容器BOSS模组。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/641535a87786; https://pan.quark.cn/s/09581e7c3331; https://pan.quark.cn/s/6e10556c8b7a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/4d8d95e27af3
Mod.AllDependencies: Vasi; HKMirror; HKTool; Nosk God; WavLib

Mod.Name: Floor is Lava
Mod.Description: Is a floor is lava mod for Hollow Knight. PLease read Read.me
Mod.DescriptionCN: 这是一个《空洞骑士》的“地板是熔岩”模组。请阅读Read.me文件。

Mod.Name: Omega Radiance
Mod.Description: Face the god of power, a modified version of Any Radiance which was made not to be harder but to be a cool and unique fight.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 面对力量之神，这是Any辐光的修改版本，其目的并非增加难度，而是打造一场酷炫且独特的战斗。

Mod.Name: Sunset Rad
Mod.Description: Modded Radiance
Mod.DescriptionCN: 模组化的辐光

Mod.Name: PURITY
Mod.Description: New Version of "Sunset Samsara II". Modded Radiance.
Mod.DescriptionCN: “夕阳轮回II”的新版本。模组化的辐光。

Mod.Name: Pure Shape
Mod.Description: Changes the player's spell and nail arts, players can use skills similar to pure containers, such as blocking counterattacks.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 改变玩家的法术和骨钉技艺，玩家可以使用类似纯粹容器的技能，例如格挡反击。

Mod.Name: Castless Focus
Mod.Description: Stops the focus button from casting when tapped. (Note: This causes tapping the focus button to always start the focus, with the same delay as if it was held)
Mod.DescriptionCN: 轻触聚焦键时不再施法。（注意：这会导致轻触聚焦键时始终开始聚焦，延迟与按住时相同）

Mod.Name: BingoBoardReplay
Mod.Description: A mod for bingo tournament organizers to help restream the board when the players have stream delay. See GitHub readme for usage.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为宾果锦标赛组织者设计的模组，用于在玩家有直播延迟时重新直播棋盘。使用方法请参见GitHub自述文件。

Mod.Name: ModCommon
Mod.Description: A hollow knight mod that provides an API of helpers and other utilities for modding hollow knight. Not recommended for use in new mods.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为《空洞骑士》模组提供辅助接口和其他实用工具的模组。不建议在新模组中使用。

Mod.Name: GrubDay2026Plando
Mod.Description: Companion Mod for the 2026 grubday plando
Mod.DescriptionCN: 2026年幼虫节预规划种子的配套模组
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/a79ff0800dd7; https://pan.quark.cn/s/0be5014bd43d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/d8c91023fb46; https://pan.quark.cn/s/471ac29689fe; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/60b9bc9c564c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/4d8d95e27af3; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/fbe938287378; https://pan.quark.cn/s/aec56712e4df; https://pan.quark.cn/s/1bd31bf1399d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/599d776cdc7f; https://pan.quark.cn/s/81e9aae3fb46; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9347f5539823; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/4f0f94d6ca42; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e789e791f64e; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7e0fa2e54131; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/de6df0630088; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9daf24fda192; https://pan.quark.cn/s/35e899288274; https://pan.quark.cn/s/32577894ddb4; https://pan.quark.cn/s/814fbb254ebf; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c793b9f5d320; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0

Mod.Name: PedroSoulOrb
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod that renders a friend when you have full soul
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，当你的灵魂满时，会显示一个朋友。

Mod.Name: RngCounters
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod that counts RNG in annoying spots.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个在烦人位置统计随机数的《空洞骑士》模组。

Mod.Name: RgbRando
Mod.Description: A Randomizer connection that allows randomization of RGB values for the shader.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一种随机器连接，允许随机化着色器的RGB值。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/2372b1d40dab
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; MenuChanger; Randomizer 4; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: LoadRandomizer
Mod.Description: Randomizes load times from 0 to 10, weighted towards lower values.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将加载时间随机化为0到10秒，并偏向较低值。

Mod.Name: BingoGoalPackSpleengy
Mod.Description: An alternate bingo goalpack designed for the lockout format
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为锁定模式设计的替代宾果目标包
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/6c97fc4141f7; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7adf0d7a9748; https://pan.quark.cn/s/122386623539; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/89c8567b0f8b; https://pan.quark.cn/s/1bd31bf1399d
Mod.AllDependencies: BingoAdvancedCustomGeneration; BingoSync; MagicUI; Satchel; ItemChanger; BingoGoalPack1

Mod.Name: BrokeLocUtil
Mod.Description: A debug extension to grant unreachable rando locations
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个调试扩展，用于授予无法到达的随机位置

Mod.Name: DeathSync
Mod.Description: An ItemSync/MultiWorld extension to link your deaths
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个物品同步/多世界扩展，用于关联你的死亡
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/7639e8ac1d03; https://pan.quark.cn/s/0be5014bd43d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a197fe50f247; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; KorzUtils; MenuChanger; MultiWorldLib; Randomizer 4; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: NotBackgroundObjectRando
Mod.Description: What no Silksong does to a community
Mod.DescriptionCN: 没有丝之歌对社区造成的影响
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/f89a3de7a27a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; MenuChanger; Randomizer 4; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: EverySceneUtil
Mod.Description: A developer tool for running code on every scene in the game
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个开发者工具，用于在游戏中的每个场景运行代码

Mod.Name: RegretRecoveryRestoration
Mod.Description: A Randomizer connection which restores the ability to recover your shade when egg shop removes it
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机Mod的连接功能，当蛋商店移除暗影时，恢复回收暗影的能力。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/6774b7ec766b; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; MenuChanger; Randomizer 4; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: TheRealTransitionRando
Mod.Description: A Randomizer connection that puts transitions into the same pool as the other items
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机Mod联动，将过渡点与其他物品放入同一个池子中
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e4b9b8d28b36; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; MenuChanger; Randomizer 4; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi
Mod.Integrations: BugPrince; ItemSync; RandoMapCore; RandoSettingsManager; RecentItemsDisplay; Scattered and Lost

Mod.Name: CorpseDreamRando
Mod.Description: A Randomizer connection that adds dream nail dialogue for background corpses

Mod.Name: Challenge Mode
Mod.Description: A mod that adds randomly selected challege modifiers to Godhome with several customization options. See ReadMe for info on modifiers and more.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为神居添加随机选择的挑战修饰符的模组，并带有多种自定义选项。有关修饰符及更多信息，请参阅自述文件。

Mod.Name: FallDamage
Mod.Description: Player takes fall damage proportional to their max health and time spent falling.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 玩家会受到与最大生命值和坠落时间成正比的坠落伤害。

Mod.Name: ExtraMenuBackgrounds
Mod.Description: Adds 5 new main menu themes to the Extras menu.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在“额外内容”菜单中添加5个新的主菜单主题。

Mod.Name: HueShifter
Mod.Description: Uses shaders to change Hallownest's colours. Can also make everything rainbows.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使用着色器改变圣巢的颜色。也可以让一切变成彩虹色。

Mod.Name: CriticalSlash
Mod.Description: Makes nail arts deal extra damage and return control faster if released at the earliest moment.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 如果在最早时机释放骨钉技艺，将造成额外伤害并更快恢复控制。

Mod.Name: Mask Maker Notches
Mod.NameCN: 面具制作师的护符槽位
Mod.Description: A mod that adds a few buyable Charm Notches in Mask Maker's room.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个在面具制作师的房间中添加几个可购买的护符槽位的模组。

Mod.Name: CelesteKnight
Mod.Description: Celeste movements like dash, super, hyper, wallbounce
Mod.DescriptionCN: 蔚蓝般的移动方式，如冲刺、超级冲刺、超级跳跃、蹬墙跳

Mod.Name: Seer
Mod.Description: Seer Modded Boss
Mod.DescriptionCN: 先知模组 BOSS
Mod.AllDependencies: WeaverCore; More Godhome Space; SFCore; WavLib

Mod.Name: AnyZote
Mod.Description: Most powerful zote modded boss ever.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 有史以来最强大的左特模组BOSS。

Mod.Name: AbsoluteZote
Mod.Description: A new GPZ mod boss. Install AbsoluteZote and PureZote together to enable AnyZote.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个新的灰色王子左特模组BOSS。同时安装无上左特与纯粹左特以启用任意左特。

Mod.Name: Nailgod
Mod.Description: Sly modded boss.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 斯莱模组BOSS。

Mod.Name: ZoteCollectorHelper
Mod.Description: Tweaks to Grey Prince Zote and ascended Collector, like the HP of zotelings and more.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 对灰色王子左特和进阶收集者进行调整，例如调整左特幼虫的生命值等。

Mod.Name: HitboxOnly
Mod.Description: Show only hitboxes and hide all sprites. This provides a new experience for several bosses since attack anticipation is no longer visible.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 仅显示判定框并隐藏所有精灵图。这为多个BOSS提供了全新的体验，因为攻击预兆不再可见。

Mod.Name: PureZote
Mod.Description: Enabled Grey Prince Zote to summon Eternal Ordeal and upgraded its skills. Install AbsoluteZote and PureZote together to enable AnyZote.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让灰色王子左特能够召唤永恒考验并升级其技能。同时安装无上左特和纯粹左特以启用任意左特。

Mod.Name: niaPfohtaP (PoP Upside Down)
Mod.Description: Makes Path of Pain upside down.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将痛苦之路上下颠倒。

Mod.Name: SteelSoulHUD
Mod.Description: Enables the Steel Soul HUD in normal mode.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在普通模式下启用钢魂HUD。

Mod.Name: Transcendence
Mod.Description: Adds 15 new charms with various abilities. Can be used with the randomizer.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 新增15个拥有各种能力的护符。可与随机Mod一同使用。

Mod.Name: RainbowEggs
Mod.Description: A randomizer add-on that makes Rancid Eggs more colorful.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机Mod的附加组件，让腐臭蛋变得更加色彩缤纷。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/ee44da4b4277; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: RandoZoomZoom
Mod.Description: A randomizer add-on that makes early movement and geo collection a bit faster.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机辅助模组，让早期移动和吉欧收集稍微快一点。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/c51aa409f8cd; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: BenchwarpSpoilerCloak
Mod.Description: A Benchwarp add-on that hides yet-to-be-visited bench names in the menu.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个回椅子模组的附加组件，可在菜单中隐藏尚未访问过的长椅名称。

Mod.Name: QoL
Mod.Description: A collection of various quality of life improvements.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一系列各种生活质量改进的合集。

Mod.Name: ScreenshotMachine
Mod.Description: A mod to better create Hollow Knight screenshots.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于更好地创建《空洞骑士》截图的模组。

Mod.Name: AsciiCamera
Mod.Description: Applies a shader to the camera which makes the game output as ascii characters.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为摄像机应用着色器，使游戏画面以ASCII字符形式输出。

Mod.Name: HollowTwitch
Mod.Description: Allows Twitch Chat to use tons of commands that spice up and vary gameplay.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许Twitch聊天使用大量命令，为玩法增添趣味和变化。

Mod.Name: Darkness
Mod.Description: Makes every room into a dark room (akin to rooms which require lantern without it).
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将每个房间都变成黑暗房间（类似于没有灯笼时所需的房间）。

Mod.Name: God Soul
Mod.Description: Makes the game really, really hard
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让游戏变得极其困难

Mod.Name: Random Pantheons
Mod.Description: Randomizes Godhome’s Pantheons so bosses appear in random order.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 随机化神居的万神殿，使BOSS以随机顺序出现。

Mod.Name: Mantis Gods
Mod.Description: Significantly buffs the Mantis Lords fight.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 大幅强化了螳螂领主的战斗。

Mod.Name: Sanic
Mod.Description: Allows changing the game timescale.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许更改游戏的时间缩放比例。

Mod.Name: ModConsole
Mod.Description: In-game C# REPL which allows you to easily test code.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 游戏内C#交互式编程环境，可让你轻松测试代码。

Mod.Name: The Pain of the Path
Mod.Description: Allows the player to complete the Path of Pain backwards, starting just above the final drop to the Kingsmoulds.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许玩家反向完成痛苦之路，从最终跳向国王傀儡的上方开始。

Mod.Name: Pale Prince
Mod.Description: Overhaul of the Pure Vessel fight with a significant increase in difficulty
Mod.DescriptionCN: 对纯粹容器战斗的全面重制，难度大幅提升

Mod.Name: Vasi
Mod.Description: A library with some utility classes.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个包含一些实用类的库。

Mod.Name: Hell Mod
Mod.Description: Various nerfs to the player and buffs to the enemies to increase the game difficulty.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 对玩家进行各种削弱，并增强敌人，以提升游戏难度。

Mod.Name: HowwowKnyight
Mod.Description: Twanswates aww of de text in Howwow Knyight into de much supewiow UwU wanguage, incwuding menyus, usew intewface and in-game diawogues! OwO
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将《空洞骑士》中的所有文本（包括菜单、用户界面和游戏内对话）翻译成更优秀的UwU语言！OwO

Mod.Name: Transtrans
Mod.Description: Tiktiks for trans rights
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为跨性别权利发声的提克提克

Mod.Name: Additional Timelines
Mod.Description: Adds extra timelines to the stats screen after the end credits.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在制作人员名单结束后，为统计界面添加额外的时间线。

Mod.Name: GrassyKnight
Mod.Description: Tracks and shows you how much grass you've cut.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 追踪并显示你割掉了多少草。

Mod.Name: CompassAlwaysOn
Mod.Description: Makes it so the Knight's icon always appears on the map, even if Wayward Compass isn't in your inventory.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使骑士的图标始终显示在地图上，即使你的物品栏中没有任性的指南针。

Mod.Name: GatheringSwarmAlwaysOn
Mod.Description: Makes it so geo is collected with Gathering Swarm, even if the charm isn't in your inventory.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 即使护符不在你的物品栏中，也能让吉欧被蜂群集结收集。

Mod.Name: Kronk
Mod.Description: Simple object counter used for speedruns. Mainly used for Kronk% (all levers).
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于速通的简单物品计数器。主要用于Kronk%（所有拉杆）。

Mod.Name: KeybindChaos
Mod.Description: Randomize the keybinds after a certain (configurable) amount of time has passed.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在经过一定（可配置）时间后随机化键位。

Mod.Name: Enemy Randomizer
Mod.Description: Mod for randomizing the enemies and related things.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于随机化敌人及相关内容的模组。

Mod.Name: Menderbug's Revenge
Mod.Description: Kill the knight whenever you break a background object.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 每当你破坏一个背景物体时，杀死骑士。

Mod.Name: Godseeker Memory Jump
Mod.Description: Face right when dreamnailing the godseeker to warp to the hidden memory, even if you've been there before.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使用梦之钉攻击寻神者时面朝右侧，即可传送至隐藏的记忆区域，即使已经去过那里也能生效。

Mod.Name: BingoUI
Mod.Description: Automatic tracking of bingo goals for randomizer and speedrun bingo races.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 自动追踪随机与速通宾果比赛中的宾果目标。

Mod.Name: EssenceAlways
Mod.Description: Choose between always or never dropping an essence when killing an enemy (if you have dream nail).
Mod.DescriptionCN: 选择在击杀敌人时（若拥有梦之钉）总是掉落精华或永不掉落精华。

Mod.Name: Invincibility Monitor
Mod.Description: Grants invincibility in some scenarios.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在某些场景中提供无敌效果。

Mod.Name: MylaFlower
Mod.Description: Protect Myla from the infection by bringing her a flower.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 通过给米拉送一朵花，保护她免受瘟疫感染。

Mod.Name: SkillUpgrades
Mod.Description: Provides a collection of upgrades and tweaks to the Knight's Skills. Visit the Mod Menu to enable them.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 提供一系列对骑士技能的升级和调整。前往模组菜单以启用它们。

Mod.Name: CondensedSpoilerLogger
Mod.Description: Creates a Condensed Spoiler Log (and several others) in the Rando Logs directory with the key information about the seed.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在随机日志目录中创建一个精简剧透日志（以及其他几个日志），其中包含该种子（Seed）的关键信息。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/6203bc8ebb61; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: SkiploverSpoilerLog
Mod.Description: Creates a Skiplover Spoiler Log in the Rando Logs directory showing what would be reachable with All skips enabled.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在随机日志目录中创建一个跳跃爱好者剧透日志，显示启用所有跳跃技巧后可到达的区域。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/81b715b7a8d0; https://pan.quark.cn/s/6203bc8ebb61; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: CondensedSpoilerLogger; Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: DapperMapperSpoils
Mod.Description: Adds a category to the condensed spoiler log which shows the locations of the 13 maps.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在精简剧透日志中添加一个类别，显示13张地图的位置。

Mod.Name: NotSpikesmas
Mod.Description: Adds an item to the randomization pool that protects against damage from spikes.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在随机化池中添加一个物品，可保护玩家免受尖刺伤害。

Mod.Name: RandoPlus
Mod.Description: Add-on for Randomizer 4 that adds more Randomization options; for example, randomize Mr Mushroom locations.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 随机Mod 4的附加组件，增加了更多随机化选项；例如，随机化蘑菇先生的位置。

Mod.Name: FountainPreview
Mod.Description: Add-on for ItemChanger that makes the basin fountain show the item it's going to give.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 物品更改器的联动Mod，使深渊盆地的喷泉会显示它将给予的物品。

Mod.Name: Randomizable Levers
Mod.Description: Randomizer 4 addon that adds the option to randomize levers. Activate lever rando in the Connections menu of Randomizer 4.
Mod.DescriptionCN: Randomizer 4 的附加模组，增加将拉杆随机化的选项。在 Randomizer 4 的“连接”菜单中激活拉杆随机化。

Mod.Name: Rope Rando
Mod.Description: Adds the rope / chandelier in the Watcher Knights boss room to Randomizer 4.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将守望者骑士BOSS房间中的绳索/吊灯添加到随机4中。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/8222ad536321; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; Satchel

Mod.Name: TrandoPlus
Mod.Description: Add-on for Randomizer 4 that adds more options to Transition Rando; for example, randomize only doorway transitions.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 随机Mod 4的扩展，为过渡随机化增加更多选项；例如，仅随机化门口过渡。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9ed4b3205732; https://pan.quark.cn/s/4a1201e7bdad; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9347f5539823; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; ConnectionMetadataInjector; RandoPlus

Mod.Name: RecentItemsDisplay
Mod.Description: Add-on for ItemChanger (and Rando) which displays recently obtained pickups in the top-right of the screen.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 物品更改器（及随机）的附加组件，可在屏幕右上角显示最近获得的拾取物。

Mod.Name: RandomizerSettingsRandomizer
Mod.Description: Add-on for Randomizer 4 that allows you to randomize settings. See the README for info on how to select settings to randomize.
Mod.DescriptionCN: Randomizer 4的附加组件，允许你随机化设置。请参阅README了解如何选择要随机化的设置。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0; https://pan.quark.cn/s/025ce6d16c4b
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: Scatternest
Mod.Description: Addon for Randomizer and ItemSync allowing players to start at multiple different locations.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 随机与物品同步的扩展模组，允许玩家从多个不同地点开始游戏。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/60b9bc9c564c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: ContainerConfig
Mod.Description: Addon for ItemChanger to control how certain checks are presented.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于物品更改器的附加组件，可控制特定检查的呈现方式。

Mod.Name: ReopenCityDoor
Mod.Description: Opens the locked door between Fungal Wastes and City (above Elder Hu's grave / near the elevator to Crossroads).
Mod.DescriptionCN: 打开真菌荒地和泪水之城之间那扇锁住的门（位于长者胡的坟墓上方 / 靠近通往遗忘十字路的电梯处）。

Mod.Name: FStats
Mod.Description: Displays some stats about a run after the credits screen.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在制作人员名单画面后显示一些关于游戏进程的统计数据。

Mod.Name: InfoPanelUtil
Mod.Description: Utils for creating info panels through DebugMod.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于通过调试模组创建信息面板的实用工具。

Mod.Name: PlayerDataManager
Mod.Description: Override player data values (for example, always set `hasQuill` to false). Having DebugMod is helpful, but not required.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 覆盖玩家数据值（例如，始终将 `hasQuill` 设为 false）。拥有调试模组会有所帮助，但并非必需。

Mod.Name: Benchwarp
Mod.Description: Mod for selecting and warping to benches. Also allows placing benches and warping to room transitions.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于选择并传送至长椅的模组。同时允许放置长椅并传送至房间过渡点。

Mod.Name: Randomizer 4
Mod.Description: Mod for randomizing items and/or transitions, with numerous customization options.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于随机化物品和/或过渡的模组，具有大量自定义选项。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: ItemChanger
Mod.Description: Mod which handles editing items and locations for other mods.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于处理其他模组的物品和位置编辑的模组。

Mod.Name: MenuChanger
Mod.Description: Mod which handles editing the main menu for other mods.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于为其他模组编辑主菜单的模组。

Mod.Name: RandomizerCore
Mod.Description: A library for randomizer logic and algorithms.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于随机逻辑和算法的库。

Mod.Name: RandomizerCore.Json
Mod.Description: A library which adds support for json-encoded logic data to RandomizerCore.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为随机Core添加JSON编码逻辑数据支持的库。

Mod.Name: ItemChangerDataLoader
Mod.NameCN: 物品更改器数据加载器
Mod.Description: Mod for creating backups of randomizer saves and launching plandos.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于创建随机存档备份和启动预规划种子的模组。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/aec56712e4df; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; MenuChanger; Randomizer 4; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: ICExtraDeployers
Mod.Description: ItemChanger add-on which preloads more objects. Use as a dependency for IC files which place custom Baldurs, gates, and more.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 物品更改器 的附加组件，用于预加载更多对象。作为 IC 文件的依赖项使用，这些文件可放置自定义的巴德尔、门等更多内容。

Mod.Name: CustomPoolInjector
Mod.Description: A Randomizer 4 add-on for providing user-defined item pools for randomizing different item combinations.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机Mod 4的附加组件，用于提供用户自定义的物品池，以随机化不同的物品组合。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/331dc879cce3; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: CustomLogicInjector
Mod.Description: A Randomizer 4 add-on for providing user-defined logic edits.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为随机4提供的用于用户自定义逻辑编辑的附加组件。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7d8e3f2a0f32; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: CustomGroupInjector
Mod.Description: A Randomizer 4 add-on for providing user-defined item groups for different split group randomizer options.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机Mod 4的附加组件，用于为不同的分组随机选项提供用户自定义的物品组。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/16c6ccc6802f; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: CustomConstraintInjector
Mod.Description: A Randomizer 4 add-on for providing user-defined constraints on placements and for editing priority weights for items and locations.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机Mod 4的附加组件，用于提供用户定义的放置约束，并编辑物品和位置的优先级权重。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/30410b60c555
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: BenchRando
Mod.Description: A Randomizer 4 add-on for randomizing benches to new locations and randomizing the ability to warp to benches as items.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机4的附加组件，用于将长椅随机分配到新位置，并将传送至长椅的能力作为物品随机化。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9e7300ae2fca; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Benchwarp; ItemChanger; RandomizerCore; Randomizer 4; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore.Json; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: ItemSync
Mod.Description: A RandomizerMod 4 add-on for sharing item pickups between players. The default IP no longer works. Please use `mw.hkmp.org` if you want to connect to the public server.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机Mod 4的扩展，用于在玩家之间共享物品拾取。默认IP已失效。如果你想连接到公共服务器，请使用 `mw.hkmp.org`。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/0be5014bd43d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/d8c91023fb46; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; MultiWorldLib

Mod.Name: MultiWorld
Mod.Description: A RandomizerMod 4 add-on for distributing players' items between all their worlds.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机Mod 4的扩展，用于在所有玩家的世界之间分配物品。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/0be5014bd43d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/45eec1a5d3a3; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; MultiWorldLib

Mod.Name: MultiWorldLib
Mod.Description: A library for ItemSync and MultiWorld network transmission.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于物品同步和多重世界网络传输的库。

Mod.Name: PaletteSwapper
Mod.Description: Mod which changes room color tint.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 更改房间色调的模组。

Mod.Name: InfiniteNotches
Mod.Description: Togglable mod for enabling infinite charm notches.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 可切换的模组，用于启用无限护符槽位。

Mod.Name: EasyMode
Mod.Description: Togglable mod for making the game slightly easier.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 可切换的模组，让游戏稍微简单一些。

Mod.Name: LoadNormalizer
Mod.Description: Mod which extends loads to a user-defined cap, to synchronize loading for races.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将加载时间延长至用户定义的上限，以同步竞速中的加载过程。

Mod.Name: AdditionalMaps
Mod.Description: Adds white palace and godhome maps. The white palace one is next to the bench in the big room. The godhome one is next to the bench above the pantheons.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加了白色宫殿和神居的地图。白色宫殿的地图位于大房间的长椅旁。神居的地图位于万神殿上方的长椅旁。

Mod.Name: BenchWarpFix
Mod.Description: When benchwarping into a scene without a bench, instead of softlock drops you into dirtmouth. Probably doesn't work with glitched runs.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 当使用回椅子功能进入一个没有长椅的场景时，你不会被卡死，而是会掉落到德特茅斯。可能不适用于有Bug的速通流程。

Mod.Name: BlindRadiance
Mod.Description: Makes background darker in selected scenes to make foreground objects more visible.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在选定场景中使背景变暗，让前景物体更加清晰可见。

Mod.Name: CarefreeRngReset
Mod.Description: This mod resets carefree melody rng to highest likelyhood of blocking each time the player enters the hall of gods.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组会在玩家每次进入神居时，将无忧旋律的随机数重置为最高格挡概率。

Mod.Name: ColosseumTrophy
Mod.Description: Reenables the colosseum trophy cut content.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 重新启用竞技场奖杯的删减内容。

Mod.Name: CursedMod
Mod.Description: This mod does miscellaneous stuff. Like making the game window be dark mode on windows.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 这个模组包含各种杂项功能。例如，让游戏窗口在Windows上变为深色模式。

Mod.Name: CustomBgm
Mod.Description: Allows customization of background music. See its readme for a how-to.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许自定义背景音乐。详情请参阅其自述文件中的操作指南。

Mod.Name: CustomSaveArt
Mod.Description: Makes white palace save art funny. Literally nothing else.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让白色宫殿的存档艺术变得有趣。仅此而已，别无其他。

Mod.Name: EnemyChanger
Mod.Description: Allows to dump and replace enemy textures. Refer to the readme on how to do that.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许导出并替换敌人材质。具体操作方法请参阅自述文件。

Mod.Name: FireIsSmolBrain
Mod.Description: Adds a soul totem to dirtmouth and blocks off boss arenas.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在德特茅斯添加一个灵魂图腾，并封锁BOSS战斗区域。

Mod.Name: FullSpeedAhead
Mod.Description: Removes Parry Slow-Down.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 移除格挡减速效果。

Mod.Name: FuryFix
Mod.Description: Tries to fix fury for 1 max health saves.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 尝试修复仅剩1点生命值时的亡者之怒效果。

Mod.Name: GeoLog
Mod.Description: Logs all geo locations in the game. Goes through the entire game on startup.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 记录游戏中所有吉欧的位置。启动时遍历整个游戏。

Mod.Name: GraphicOptions
Mod.Description: Adds a "few" graphics options. Some of those "might" be unstable to change.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加“一些”图形选项。其中部分选项“可能”不稳定，更改需谨慎。

Mod.Name: HKHKHKHKHK
Mod.NameCN: 空洞骑士空洞骑士空洞骑士空洞骑士空洞骑士
Mod.Description: VVVVVVV but in HK. Flip gravity with the R key.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在《空洞骑士》中体验《VVVVVV》。按R键翻转重力。

Mod.Name: HollowKnightAchievementManager
Mod.Description: Allows to manage Hollow Knight achievements, both vanilla and modded. Also syncs them with the online store of choice (GOG, Steam, XBox). Also allows to un-/lock menu themes and game modes.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许管理《空洞骑士》的成就，包括原版和模组成就。同时将成就与所选的在线商店（GOG、Steam、XBox）同步。还允许解锁/锁定菜单主题和游戏模式。

Mod.Name: LanguageSupport
Mod.Description: Allows additional languages to be supported. Doesn't allow for some characters of other languages yet.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许支持更多语言。但尚不支持某些其他语言的字符。

Mod.Name: MenuThemesInGame
Mod.Description: Applies the menu color correction to gameplay. Breaks immersion.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将菜单的颜色校正应用于游戏玩法。破坏沉浸感。

Mod.Name: MoreHealing
Mod.Description: Adds more healing charms.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 增加更多治疗护符。

Mod.Name: MoreMapMarkers
Mod.Description: Adds configurably more map markers.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加可配置的更多地图标记。

Mod.Name: MoreMasks
Mod.Description: Makes more masks available to be displayed. Also works for lifeblood masks. By default it shows 28 masks per row. Can be adjusted by editing the globalsettings file of this mod.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使更多面具能够被显示。也适用于生命血面具。默认每行显示28个面具。可通过编辑此模组的全局设置文件进行调整。

Mod.Name: MoreNotches
Mod.Description: Makes more charm notches available to be displayed. Also works for overcharm and charm detail notches. By default it shows up to 50 equipped notches and 20 charm detail notches. Can be adjusted by editing the globalsettings file of this mod.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使更多护符槽位能够显示。同样适用于过载护符和护符详情槽位。默认显示最多50个已装备槽位和20个护符详情槽位。可通过编辑此模组的全局设置文件进行调整。

Mod.Name: NailsmithBackPay
Mod.Description: Get your geo back from the nailsmith after upgrading your nail.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在升级骨钉后，从铁匠那里拿回你的吉欧。

Mod.Name: NeverMuffle
Mod.Description: Removes the muffling sound effect when taking damage.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 移除受到伤害时的消音音效。

Mod.Name: PeakingPeekingPeaks
Mod.Description: This mods aims to make the Crystal Peak name more memorable.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 这个模组旨在让水晶山峰的名字更加令人难忘。

Mod.Name: PvpArena
Mod.Description: This mod adds a PvP arena with an invisible entrance right of the bench in Dirtmouth.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组添加了一个PvP竞技场，入口位于德特茅斯长椅右侧，且为隐形入口。

Mod.Name: RadiantMenu
Mod.Description: Adds a radiant menu theme to the game.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为游戏添加一个辐光主题的菜单。

Mod.Name: RedoBirthplace
Mod.Description: Redo the Birthplace cutscene.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 重制诞生地过场动画。

Mod.Name: ResetCharmNotches
Mod.Description: Reset charm notches and charm notch cost.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 重置护符槽位和护符槽位消耗。

Mod.Name: ScenePainter
Mod.Description: Creates SVG images of all scenes in the game. Can be initiated manually using the K key.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 创建游戏中所有场景的SVG图像。可使用K键手动启动。

Mod.Name: ScreenResolution
Mod.Description: Adds more available screen resolution options.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 增加更多可用的屏幕分辨率选项。

Mod.Name: SFCore
Mod.Description: Library mod used by other mods.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 被其他模组使用的库模组。

Mod.Name: ShowFPS
Mod.Description: A mod that adds a FPS display in the bottom right corner.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个在右下角添加帧数显示的模组。

Mod.Name: SpriteDumper
Mod.Description: A mod that dumps sprites. Can take more than 10 minutes per dump. Uses the P key to initiate dumping.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于导出精灵图的模组。每次导出可能需要超过10分钟。按P键开始导出。

Mod.Name: StoriesOfaHkPlayer-Ch1
Mod.Description: The start of a story of a Hollow Knight player and his personalized copy of the game.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一位空洞骑士玩家与他个性化游戏副本的故事开端。

Mod.Name: StoriesOfaHkPlayer-Ch2
Mod.NameCN: 空洞骑士玩家故事-第二章
Mod.Description: The second iteration of a story of a Hollow Knight player and his personalized copy of the game. Warning for people streaming this mod: This mod displays your windows/mac/linux username.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一位空洞骑士玩家及其个性化游戏副本故事的第二章。 警告：直播此模组的人请注意，此模组会显示你的Windows/Mac/Linux用户名。

Mod.Name: SvgLib
Mod.Description: SVG parser and composer library for .NET Framework and .NET Core.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于 .NET Framework 和 .NET Core 的 SVG 解析与合成库。

Mod.Name: TestOfTeamwork
Mod.Description: Adds a Path of Pain style section to the White Palace. Start by talking to people in and around dirtmouth. This is a singleplayer mod. The "teamwork" refers to in-game events.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在白色宫殿中添加一段痛苦之路风格的区域。 首先与德特茅斯及其周边的角色对话。 这是一个单人模组。“团队协作”指的是游戏内的事件。

Mod.Name: VoidHeartMenu
Mod.Description: Makes the Voidheart edition text appear on pc versions of the game.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让虚空之心版本的文本出现在游戏的PC版本中。

Mod.Name: WavLib
Mod.Description: A library to read and write WAV files.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于读取和写入WAV文件的库。

Mod.Name: WideCamera
Mod.Description: Make ultrawide screens possible without black bars. Should also work for thinner/taller than 16:9. In theory.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使超宽屏幕无黑边成为可能。理论上，也适用于比16:9更窄或更高的屏幕。

Mod.Name: ZaliantsSurprise
Mod.Description: This is a mod idea by Zaliant. Former Description: This is the Pale Court mod. Enjoy!
Mod.DescriptionCN: 这是由Zaliant提出的一个模组创意。 原描述： 这是苍白宫廷模组。 祝您玩得开心！

Mod.Name: RandomGravityChange
Mod.Description: A mod that randomly changes gravity periodically or on key press.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个会定期或在按下按键时随机改变重力的模组。

Mod.Name: RandomTeleport
Mod.Description: A mod that randomly teleports you to another scene periodically, on key press or on damage.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个模组，可让你按周期、按下按键或受到伤害时随机传送到另一个场景。

Mod.Name: DebugMod
Mod.Description: Allows for debug tools and features like no clip, invincibility, removing and giving items and abilities.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许使用调试工具和功能，例如穿墙、无敌、移除和给予物品及能力。

Mod.Name: SpeedRunQoL
Mod.Description: A debug Add On that adds new keybinds that are QoL for speedrunning practice. Currently adds Position Save States, Glitched Binds, Force Extra Uumuu attack and radiance quick reload
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个调试附加模组，为速通练习添加了新的生活质量快捷键。目前增加了位置保存状态、故障绑定、强制乌姆额外攻击以及辐光快速重载。

Mod.Name: MoreSaves
Mod.Description: Allows for infinite saves. Uses modmenu to provide other features such as backup/restore, rename, lock and edit values in saves. Note: Editing the current save you are in now takes effect in game
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许无限存档。使用模组菜单提供其他功能，如备份/恢复、重命名、锁定和编辑存档中的数值。注意：编辑当前正在进行的存档将立即在游戏中生效。

Mod.Name: Gorb Plus
Mod.Description: A mod that adds an additional attack when fighting gorb: a nail barrage.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为戈布战斗增加额外攻击的模组：骨钉弹幕。

Mod.Name: HKMP HealthDisplay
Mod.NameCN: 空洞骑士多人联机 生命值显示
Mod.Description: An addon for HKMP that uses HkmpPouch. Works on the public server.Displays the amount of health other players have
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于空洞骑士多人联机的附加组件，需配合HkmpPouch使用。可在公共服务器上运行。显示其他玩家的生命值数量。

Mod.Name: Gravity Mod
Mod.Description: Adds gravity to all objects
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为所有对象添加重力

Mod.Name: GlassSoul
Mod.Description: Makes you die in one hit. Also adds option in modmenu to increases damage dealt by 1 for each extra health
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让你一击必死。同时在模组菜单中添加选项，每增加一点额外生命值，造成的伤害提高1点。

Mod.Name: Toggle Rando Split Options
Mod.Description: An extension to the mod Toggleable bindings. It adds split claw, split cloak and cursed nail to the binding list.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 这是“四锁Mod”的一个扩展。它为束缚列表增加了分裂爪、分裂披风和诅咒骨钉选项。

Mod.Name: Hide Mod List
Mod.Description: Allows you to hide your mod list or reduce the space the mod list takes on the screen.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你隐藏模组列表，或减少模组列表在屏幕上占用的空间。

Mod.Name: Additional Challenge
Mod.Description: A mod that allows you to use 46 different effects to make your game more challenging. There are 4 types of effects (Persistent, Cooldown, Boss Attack, Enemy Follow) that can be enabled from modmenu. There is also a choas mode that randomly selects effects to happen periodically.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个模组，允许你使用46种不同的效果来增加游戏挑战性。共有4种效果类型（持续、冷却、BOSS攻击、敌人跟随），可通过模组菜单启用。此外还有混沌模式，会随机定期触发效果。

Mod.Name: Poorly Translated
Mod.Description: Poorly Translated Hollow Knight. All text in the game is run through a chain of google translates. Available in English, German, Spanish, French, Italian and Chinese. Note: the English translations were revamped from the 1.4 version to be translated even more poorly
Mod.DescriptionCN: 拙劣翻译的《空洞骑士》。游戏中的所有文本都经过一连串谷歌翻译处理。支持英文、德文、西班牙文、法文、意大利文和中文。注意：英文翻译从1.4版本开始进行了重制，使其翻译得更加拙劣。

Mod.Name: HKMirror
Mod.Description: A core mod that makes it easier to access PlayerData, use reflection, and on/il hooks.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个核心模组，用于更便捷地访问玩家数据、使用反射以及启用/禁用 IL 钩子。

Mod.Name: ControllerFixes
Mod.Description: Fixes some controller issues and adds related features.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 修复一些控制器问题并添加相关功能。

Mod.Name: NoDying
Mod.Description: A simple mod that doesn't allow your health to go below 1 health
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个简单的模组，不让你的生命值低于1点。

Mod.Name: WeaverCore
Mod.Description: Core mod required for mods built with WeaverCore, such as Inferno King Grimm and Corrupted Kin
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使用WeaverCore构建的模组所需的核心模组，例如地狱火之王格林和腐化近亲

Mod.Name: Inferno King Grimm
Mod.Description: A mod that significantly buffs Nightmare King Grimm into a multi-phase fight. It also includes a hard mode that can be configured on the main menu
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个将梦魇之王格林大幅强化为多阶段战斗的模组。它还包含一个可以在主菜单配置的困难模式。

Mod.Name: Corrupted Kin
Mod.Description: A mod that significantly changes up the Lost Kin bossfight
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个大幅改变失落近亲BOSS战的模组。

Mod.Name: Crystal Machinist
Mod.Description: A mod that significantly changes up the Enraged Guardian bossfight
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个大幅改变愤怒守卫BOSS战的模组。

Mod.Name: More Godhome Space
Mod.Description: Adds a third floor to the Hall of Gods area so more modded bosses can be added
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为诸神殿堂区域增加第三层，以便添加更多模组BOSS。

Mod.Name: Ancient Aspid
Mod.Description: A mod for Hollow Knight that adds a brand new, challenging bossfight to Kingdom's Edge
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为《空洞骑士》添加全新、具有挑战性的BOSS战的模组，战斗发生在王国边缘。
Mod.AllDependencies: WeaverCore; More Godhome Space; SFCore; WavLib

Mod.Name: HKMP
Mod.Description: Hollow Knight Multiplayer allows people to host games and let others join them in their adventures.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 空洞骑士多人联机允许玩家主持游戏，并让他人加入他们的冒险。

Mod.Name: HKMP Prop Hunt
Mod.NameCN: 空洞骑士多人联机 道具捉迷藏
Mod.Description: An HKMP add-on that adds Prop Hunt to multiplayer games.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个空洞骑士多人联机附加组件，为联机游戏添加了道具捉迷藏模式。

Mod.Name: HKVR
Mod.Description: Play Hollow Knight in virtual reality.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在虚拟现实中游玩《空洞骑士》。

Mod.Name: Enemy HP Bar
Mod.Description: Adds skinnable HP bars to every enemies and bosses in the game.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为游戏中的每个敌人和BOSS添加可自定义皮肤的血量条。

Mod.Name: MagicUI
Mod.Description: A core mod to help other mods build UIs. Does nothing on its own.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个帮助其他模组构建界面的核心模组。本身不提供任何功能。

Mod.Name: ConnectionMetadataInjector
Mod.Description: A core mod to allow randomizer-supplemental mods like RandoStats and MapModS to get custom metadata from connections without requiring hard dependencies.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个核心模组，允许像 RandoStats 和 MapModS 这样的随机补充模组从连接中获取自定义元数据，而无需硬性依赖。

Mod.Name: RandoStats
Mod.Description: A randomizer-supplemental mod that provides detailed check and obtain stats on the completion screen.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机补充模组，在完成界面提供详细的检查与获取统计信息。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/de6df0630088; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/fbe938287378; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/1bd31bf1399d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9347f5539823; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; ConnectionMetadataInjector; MagicUI; Satchel; FStats

Mod.Name: MajorItemByAreaTracker
Mod.Description: A randomizer connection that adds a semi-spoiler randomizer game mode with an in-game tracker.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个随机器联动模组，添加了带有游戏内追踪器的半剧透随机器游戏模式。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/2f13d796a9ce; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/1bd31bf1399d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9347f5539823; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; ConnectionMetadataInjector; MagicUI; Satchel

Mod.Name: RandoChecksCounter
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod that provides a live counter of locations checked.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，提供已检查位置的实时计数器。

Mod.Name: TheRealJournalRando
Mod.Description: Randomizer 4 addon that adds the option to randomize all other Hunter's Journal entries. Activate in the Connections menu of Randomizer 4.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 随机4的附加模组，增加选项以随机化所有其他猎人日志条目。在随机4的联动菜单中激活。

Mod.Name: RandoSettingsManager
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod that reimplements and extends Randomizer's settings sharing and preset management with rich support for connection mods.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，重新实现并扩展了随机Mod的设置分享和预设管理功能，并提供了对联机Mod的丰富支持。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/81e9aae3fb46; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: MenuChanger; Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: ModTerminal
Mod.Description: Adds an in-game terminal for entering commands and cheats as a DebugMod addon.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 作为调试模组的一个附加组件，在游戏中添加一个用于输入命令和作弊码的终端。

Mod.Name: ICDebug
Mod.Description: A ModTerminal addon which adds commands related to ItemChanger.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个模组终端插件，添加了与物品更改器相关的命令。

Mod.Name: MoreLocations
Mod.Description: Randomizer 4 addon that adds assorted locations to the randomizer. Activate in the Connections menu of Randomizer 4.
Mod.DescriptionCN: Randomizer 4 的扩展，为随机器添加了多种地点。在 Randomizer 4 的“连接”菜单中激活。

Mod.Name: ICPlandoTools
Mod.Description: Adds assorted utilities for plando authors.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为预规划种子作者提供各种实用工具。

Mod.Name: GhostHunter
Mod.Description: A mod that shows the positions of other player's enemies during multiplay.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个在联机模式下显示其他玩家敌人位置的模组。

Mod.Name: EmoteWheel
Mod.Description: A mod that allows using custom emotes (also works during multiplay if the server has HkmpPouch).
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个允许使用自定义表情的模组（如果服务器安装了HkmpPouch，也可在联机模式下使用）。

Mod.Name: MultiplayerEvents
Mod.NameCN: 空洞骑士多人联机事件
Mod.Description: A mod that adds some Multiplayer interactions.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个增加多人联机互动的模组。

Mod.Name: HkmpPouch
Mod.Description: A dependency mod for optional hkmp addons with networking.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于可选空洞骑士MP联机附加组件的依赖模组，提供网络功能。

Mod.Name: Satchel
Mod.Description: A Satchel is a bag, this one has cool stuff for other mods to use.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 背包是一种袋子，这个背包里装着供其他模组使用的酷炫物品。

Mod.Name: Custom Knight
Mod.Description: Supports Skins for Player, Enemies and Area overhauls
Mod.DescriptionCN: 支持玩家、敌人和区域改装的皮肤

Mod.Name: Asymmetric Knight
Mod.Description: A Custom Knight Addon that allows left and right looking knight sprites to be different.Add a Knight_left.png, Sprint_left.png and Unn_left.png to use.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个自定义骑士的扩展模组，允许左右朝向的骑士精灵图不同。添加 Knight_left.png、Sprint_left.png 和 Unn_left.png 即可使用。

Mod.Name: RandomCompanions
Mod.Description: A Custom Knight Addon that allows hatchlings and weaverlings to use all available skins
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个自定义骑士的扩展，允许幼体和小编织者使用所有可用的皮肤。

Mod.Name: SmolKnight
Mod.Description: Allows changing size of the knight
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许改变骑士的大小

Mod.Name: All4Love
Mod.Description: Love 4 All.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 爱满天下。

Mod.Name: SmashKnight
Mod.Description: Changes Knight handling based on health remaining.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 根据剩余生命值改变骑士的操作手感。

Mod.Name: ESoulLink
Mod.Description: A Pouch Mod that makes enemies share health over HKMP server.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个口袋Mod，让敌人在空洞骑士多人联机服务器上共享生命值。

Mod.Name: ModScript
Mod.Description: Allows writing scripts in JavaScript to mod the game.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许使用JavaScript编写脚本来修改游戏。

Mod.Name: HKmote
Mod.Description: Use emotes during multiplayer
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在联机时使用表情

Mod.Name: Hat
Mod.Description: Wear Hats
Mod.DescriptionCN: 戴上帽子

Mod.Name: Memesong
Mod.Description: Play some meme audio clips as you play (can add or remove clips to make stream friendly)
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在游戏过程中播放一些迷因音频片段（可以添加或移除片段以适合直播）

Mod.Name: GrubTrain
Mod.Description: Grubs as Companions
Mod.DescriptionCN: 幼虫作为伙伴

Mod.Name: Konpanion
Mod.Description: A tiny knight companion
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个微小的骑士伙伴

Mod.Name: Glass Cannon Mod
Mod.Description: Makes everything one shot, including you
Mod.DescriptionCN: 所有攻击均为一击必杀，包括你自己。

Mod.Name: FrogCore
Mod.Description: Library mod containing helpers for adding journal entries, npcs, shops and many tk2d helpers for editing and creating sprite collections and animations.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 库模组，包含用于添加日志条目、NPC、商店的辅助工具，以及许多用于编辑和创建精灵图集与动画的tk2d辅助工具。

Mod.Name: CustomKnightSuperAnimationAddon
Mod.NameCN: 自定义骑士超级动画附加组件
Mod.Description: Allows inserting custom spritesheets for animations. To export spritesheets, use https://github.com/RedFrog6002/sseadv
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许插入用于动画的自定义精灵图表。要导出精灵图表，请使用 https://github.com/RedFrog6002/sseadv

Mod.Name: Unity Explorer
Mod.Description: Useful tool for mod developers to view and edit how the game is structured.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 对模组开发者有用的工具，用于查看和编辑游戏的结构。

Mod.Name: Fast Travel
Mod.Description: Travel anywhere within Hallownest by clicking on the map.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 点击地图即可在圣巢内任意地点旅行。

Mod.Name: Game Object Dump
Mod.Description: Allows extraction of atlases, sprites, and audio clips from game objects in the scene.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许从场景中的游戏对象提取图集、精灵图和音频片段。

Mod.Name: Gatling Aspid
Mod.Description: Makes primal aspids wield gatling miniguns; configuration options available.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让原始阿斯匹德装备加特林机枪；提供配置选项。

Mod.Name: Aspid Queen
Mod.Description: Adds a primal aspid boss fight to the Hall of Gods.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在诸神堂中添加一场原生阿斯皮德BOSS战。

Mod.Name: SkipToRadiance
Mod.Description: Makes HK instantly go to phase 4 after dying to The Radiance. Useful for practicing modded Radiance or just if you're too slack to fight HK over and over.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在死于辐光后，让空洞骑士立即进入第四阶段。适用于练习模组化的辐光，或者只是你懒得一遍又一遍地打空洞骑士。

Mod.Name: Toggleable Bindings
Mod.Description: Adds the ability to activate/deactivate individual Godhome bindings at any time and lets other developers create custom bindings easier.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 增加了随时激活/停用神居各个锁的能力，并让其他开发者更容易创建自定义锁。

Mod.Name: HollowPoint
Mod.Description: Gives the player a gun, reworks charms and abilities to play around the concept of gun usage
Mod.DescriptionCN: 给玩家一把枪，重新设计护符和技能，以围绕枪械使用的概念进行游玩。

Mod.Name: Golden Godhome
Mod.Description: Reskins bosses in the Godhome to have more golden designs and details
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将神居中的BOSS重新上色，使其拥有更多金色设计和细节。

Mod.Name: Hall of Gods Extras
Mod.Description: Adds The Hollow Knight and The Radiance to the Hall of Gods.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将空洞骑士和辐光添加到神居。

Mod.Name: Custom Trial
Mod.Description: Allows creation of custom trials for the Colosseum of Fools.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许为愚人竞技场创建自定义试炼。

Mod.Name: SilkSong (but not really)
Mod.Description: Allows the player to play as hornet.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许玩家扮演大黄蜂。

Mod.Name: Discord Rich Presence
Mod.Description: Formerly known as "HollowKnightDRPC", this mod adds detailed game status to your Discord profile (when clicked on the username).
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组原名“HollowKnightDRPC”，可为你的 Discord 个人资料（点击用户名时）添加详细的游戏状态信息。

Mod.Name: Aspidnest
Mod.Description: Adds many unkillable enemies such as Primal Aspids, Crystal Hunters, Loodles, Mantis Petras, Hive Soldiers, Hive Guardians, Squits, Mossflies, Flukefeys and Lance Sentries that follow you in the entirety of Hallownest. This mod is configurable to your own liking in the options page of this mod.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加了许多无法杀死的敌人，例如原始阿斯皮德、水晶猎人、鲁多、螳螂佩特拉、蜂巢士兵、蜂巢守卫、斯奎特、苔藓蝇、吸虫之敌和长枪哨兵，它们会在整个圣巢中跟随你。此模组可在其选项页面中根据你的喜好进行配置。

Mod.Name: Osmi
Mod.Description: A library mod providing utilities for other mods
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为其他模组提供实用功能的库模组

Mod.Name: GodSeekerPlus
Mod.Description: Various tweaks and utilities to enhance your Godhome experience
Mod.DescriptionCN: 各种调整和实用功能，提升你的神居体验

Mod.Name: CompanionCloth
Mod.Description: Let Cloth accompany and fight with you all the way
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让阿布一路陪伴你并与你并肩作战。

Mod.Name: HealthShare
Mod.Description: Let some bosses use shared health, API part has moved to Osmi
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让部分BOSS共享生命值，API部分已移至Osmi

Mod.Name: Everwatchers
Mod.Description: A mod boss based on Watcher Knights, allowing you to fight all of them simutanuously and add more of them
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个基于守望者骑士的模组BOSS，允许你同时与所有守望者骑士战斗，并增加更多数量。

Mod.Name: TribeOfBattle
Mod.Description: A boss based on Sisters of Battle and Traitor Lord
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个基于战斗修女和叛徒领主的BOSS。

Mod.Name: Crystalblobbles
Mod.Description: A boss based on Oblobbles
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个基于奥波球球的BOSS

Mod.Name: ContinueCountdown
Mod.Description: Adds a countdown upon continuing
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在继续游戏时添加一个倒计时

Mod.Name: CharmPreset
Mod.Description: A mod that allows saving and loading charm presets
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个允许保存和加载护符预设的模组

Mod.Name: DoubleJumpFix
Mod.Description: A mod to fix the notorious bug that the double jump is sometimes not properly canceled
Mod.DescriptionCN: 修复了二段跳有时无法正确取消的著名Bug的模组。

Mod.Name: No Particles
Mod.Description: Disables most of the particle effects.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 禁用大部分粒子效果。

Mod.Name: AlreadyEnoughPlayMaker
Mod.Description: A optimization mod for PlayMaker FSMs.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个针对PlayMaker有限状态机的优化模组。

Mod.Name: WebPCodec
Mod.Description: WebP codec support for Texture2D
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为材质2D提供WebP编解码支持

Mod.Name: FLACCodec
Mod.Description: FLAC codec support for AudioClip
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为音频剪辑提供FLAC编解码器支持

Mod.Name: Vanilla Map Mod
Mod.Description: Adds all items/locations to the existing map.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将全部物品/地点添加到现有地图中。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/9d17acd70483; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/1bd31bf1399d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7e0fa2e54131; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9347f5539823
Mod.AllDependencies: ConnectionMetadataInjector; ItemChanger; MapChanger; MagicUI; Satchel; Vasi

Mod.Name: GeoHunger
Mod.Description: You gradually lose geo and gradually lose health at 0 geo.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 你会逐渐失去吉欧，并在吉欧为0时逐渐失去生命值。

Mod.Name: Pantheons Hit Counter
Mod.Description: Counts hits in pantheons automatically.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 自动统计万神殿中的命中次数。

Mod.Name: Hit Counter
Mod.Description: Allow creating custom counters for counting hits.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许创建自定义计数器来统计命中次数。

Mod.Name: DoubleRadiance
Mod.Description: You can battle with two radiance at same time ,their hp is shared.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 你可以同时与两个辐光战斗，它们的生命值共享。

Mod.Name: CustomImage
Mod.Description: You can change some sprites.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 你可以更改一些精灵图。

Mod.Name: ThecurseofSly
Mod.Description: When you get geo,you will get damage or die.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 当你获得吉欧时，你会受到伤害或死亡。

Mod.Name: FuryMod
Mod.Description: A mod if you equipped Fury of Fallen,you will be 1 health and can use it
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个模组，如果你装备了亡者之怒，你将只剩1点生命值并可以使用它。

Mod.Name: ReverseKnight
Mod.Description: The knight... look a little strange...
Mod.DescriptionCN: 骑士……看起来有点奇怪……

Mod.Name: Fragile Purse
Mod.Description: Makes you drop geo whenever you get hit, and has a setting to kill you if you get hit without any geo
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让你在受到攻击时掉落吉欧，并且有一个设置，如果你在没有吉欧的情况下被击中，会直接杀死你。

Mod.Name: DeathCounter
Mod.Description: A cool DeathCounter
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个很酷的死亡计数器

Mod.Name: DecorationMaster
Mod.Description: A mod for making area harder by adding spike and saw
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个通过增加尖刺和锯刃来提升区域难度的模组

Mod.Name: HKTracker
Mod.Description: Tracks player data. Most frequently used to display abilities/charms during streams
Mod.DescriptionCN: 追踪玩家数据。最常用于在直播中显示能力/护符。

Mod.Name: FragileStrengthForNailArts
Mod.Description: Allows Fragile / Unbreakable Strength to increase Nail Art damage. Originally by TTacco
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许易碎/坚固力量增加骨钉技艺的伤害。原作者：TTacco

Mod.Name: ParryKnight
Mod.Description: Enemies who can be parried only take damage from parries. Only spells can damage other enemies.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 可被招架的敌人只会受到招架伤害。只有法术才能伤害其他敌人。

Mod.Name: PaperKnight
Mod.Description: Sprites are animated with a paper-spinning effect when objects turn.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 当物体转向时，精灵图会以纸片旋转的效果进行动画。

Mod.Name: Abskoth
Mod.Description: A gameplay mod that adds invincible Markoths to the Absolute Radiance fight.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个玩法模组，为无上辐光战斗添加了无敌的马克斯。

Mod.Name: QuirrelBoat
Mod.Description: A mod which makes Quirrel interactable after the events at Blue Lake.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个让奎若在蓝湖事件后变得可互动的模组。

Mod.Name: BingoBoard
Mod.Description: In-game bingo board display.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 游戏内宾果板显示。

Mod.Name: HKTool Legacy
Mod.Description: A library mod.No longer maintained!!!**If it crashes your game, this is normal and the reason is unknown**
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个库模组。不再维护！！！**如果它导致你的游戏崩溃，这是正常现象，原因未知**

Mod.Name: HKTool
Mod.Description: A library mod. (Linux not supported)
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个库模组。（不支持 Linux）

Mod.Name: ShieldParry
Mod.Description: Allows player to use shield in the game
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许玩家在游戏中使用盾牌

Mod.Name: Backdash
Mod.Description: Allows player to use back dash in the game
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许玩家在游戏中使用后撤步。

Mod.Name: ChangeHud
Mod.Description: A mod let you can use different kinds of huds in same mode.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个模组，让你可以在同一模式下使用不同类型的HUD。

Mod.Name: QuirrelFlower
Mod.Description: A little gift for qurriel
Mod.DescriptionCN: 给奎若的一份小礼物

Mod.Name: UnityExplorerPlus
Mod.Description: A mod that adds functionality to UnityExplorer
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为UnityExplorer增加功能的模组

Mod.Name: Dead Cells Barrel Launcher
Mod.Description: Change the knight's weapon to Barrel Launcher
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将骑士的武器更换为桶式发射器

Mod.Name: HKTimer
Mod.Description: An in game timer mod for 1.5
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于1.5版本的游戏内计时器模组

Mod.Name: SeedSummon
Mod.Description: A mod you can summon lifeseed!
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个可以召唤生命种子的模组！

Mod.Name: Negative Nail
Mod.Description: Makes your nail do negative damage forcing you to rely on spells. Recommended you play with Enemy HP Bar mod.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让你的骨钉造成负伤害，迫使你依赖法术。建议搭配敌人血量条模组游玩。

Mod.Name: DumbEnemy
Mod.Description: Make Enemy and their attack invisible
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使敌人及其攻击变为隐形

Mod.Name: CountDownForLife
Mod.Description: When CountDown went to zero,you will be punished
Mod.DescriptionCN: 当倒计时归零时，你将受到惩罚

Mod.Name: CustomJournal
Mod.Description: A CK addon mod to custom journal image
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个自定义骑士的附加模组，用于自定义日志图片

Mod.Name: Dead Cells The Queen
Mod.Description: The mod has been abandoned and is no longer maintained, please use 'Dead Cells Bosses'
Mod.DescriptionCN: 该模组已被弃用，不再维护，请使用“死亡细胞 BOSS”。
Mod.AllDependencies: HKTool Legacy; HKTool; Dead Cells Bosses

Mod.Name: Dead Cells Bosses
Mod.Description: Add Dead Cells' Bosses to Hollow Knight
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将《死亡细胞》的BOSS添加到《空洞骑士》中

Mod.Name: Dead Cells Time Keeper
Mod.Description: Add TimeKeeper statue
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加时间守护者雕像

Mod.Name: ShadeControl
Mod.Description: A DebugAddition make you can control shade spell
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个调试附加模组，让你可以控制暗影法术

Mod.Name: CustomAudio
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod can replace some kind of audio
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，可以替换某些音频。

Mod.Name: Zote Killer
Mod.Description: Allows you to kill the Zote in the Colosseum
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你在竞技场中杀死左特。

Mod.Name: Cyclone Throws
Mod.Description: Allows you to throw the Cyclone as a ranged weapon
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你将旋风劈砍作为远程武器投掷出去。

Mod.Name: Mirrored Hallownest
Mod.Description: Mirrors the entire Hollow Knight map
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将整个《空洞骑士》地图镜像翻转

Mod.Name: Archipelago
Mod.Description: Enables play with the Archipelago multiworld system.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 启用与群岛多世界系统的联机游玩。

Mod.Name: GreatChampion
Mod.Description: A Modboss for failed champion
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为失败冠军设计的模组BOSS

Mod.Name: Cyclone Real Combat
Mod.Description: Removed the learn Cyclone cutscene in and replaced it with real combat
Mod.DescriptionCN: 移除了学习旋风劈砍的过场动画，并将其替换为真正的战斗。

Mod.Name: OrbTracker
Mod.Description: Points an arrow to the closest Whispering Root orb, and counts how many you have gotten.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 指向最近的低语之根精华球，并统计你已收集的数量。

Mod.Name: CustomPantheon
Mod.Description: A mod add an extra boss door in God Home,BossSequence decided by yourself .
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个在神居添加额外BOSS门的模组，BOSS序列由你自己决定。

Mod.Name: HKMP.ModDiff
Mod.NameCN: 空洞骑士多人联机.模组差异
Mod.Description: HKMP Addon for checking mod lists between Clients and Servers.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于检查客户端与服务器之间模组列表的空洞骑士MP扩展。

Mod.Name: HKMP.CheckSave
Mod.NameCN: 空洞骑士多人联机.检查存档
Mod.Description: HKMP Addon for checking player save
Mod.DescriptionCN: 空洞骑士多人联机 附加组件，用于检查玩家存档

Mod.Name: RandomCharm
Mod.Description: A HollowKnight mod change charm you equipped each scene in random(include Transcendence new charms)
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，每次进入新场景时随机更换你装备的护符（包括超越新护符）。

Mod.Name: Uumuu Plus
Mod.Description: Uumuu has been slightly enhanced
Mod.DescriptionCN: 乌姆已被略微强化

Mod.Name: press g to dab
Mod.Description: press g and the knight will dab
Mod.DescriptionCN: 按G键，骑士会做出Dab动作

Mod.Name: Inputs Recheck
Mod.Description: Rechecks for the held buttons on any Knight state change, so the action is triggered even if the button was pushed down before it was available, if the button is still held down. Based on Input Buffers mod by Phenomenol, but with completely different logic.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在骑士任何状态变化时重新检测按住的按键，因此即使按键在可用之前已被按下，只要按键仍被按住，动作仍会被触发。基于Phenomenol的输入缓冲模组，但逻辑完全不同。

Mod.Name: Input Buffers
Mod.Description: Allows for buffering inputs for every knight action.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许为每个骑士动作缓冲输入。

Mod.Name: PathOfPureVessel
Mod.Description: Battle with PV at the end of POP
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在痛苦之路的尽头与纯粹容器战斗

Mod.Name: Fennel
Mod.Description: Ports the Fennel fight from Momodora Reverie Under the Moonlight into Hollow Knight
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将《莫莫多拉：月下遐想》中的茴香战斗移植到《空洞骑士》中

Mod.Name: Propeller Knight
Mod.Description: Adds Propeller Knight from Shovel Knight to Hollow Knight.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将《铲子骑士》中的螺旋桨骑士加入《空洞骑士》。

Mod.Name: Cagney Carnation
Mod.Description: Hollow Knight mod that adds Cagney Carnation boss from Cuphead.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为《空洞骑士》添加《茶杯头》中卡格尼康乃馨BOSS的模组。

Mod.Name: Fake Peppino
Mod.Description: Adds Fake Peppino boss from Pizza Tower.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加来自《披萨塔》的假佩皮诺BOSS。

Mod.Name: Any Radiance 3.0
Mod.Description: Any Radiance 3.0
Mod.DescriptionCN: Any辐光 3.0

Mod.Name: Rando Vanilla Tracker
Mod.Description: Randomizer 4 add-on for tracking non-randomized items.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 随机Mod 4的附加组件，用于追踪非随机化物品。

Mod.Name: HKMP Tag
Mod.NameCN: 空洞骑士多人联机 标签
Mod.Description: An HKMP addon that adds the tag game-mode.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为空洞骑士多人联机添加标签游戏模式的扩展。

Mod.Name: The Glimmering Realm
Mod.Description: Adds a game mode that changes the layout, items and lore of Hallownest into a whole new world to explore - the Glimmering Realm! Join the Discord at https://discord.gg/wP2FFY6uAB
Mod.DescriptionCN: 新增一种游戏模式，将圣巢的布局、物品和背景故事改变为一个全新的探索世界——微光之域！加入Discord：https://discord.gg/wP2FFY6uAB

Mod.Name: Convenient Path of Pain
Mod.Description: This mod makes it so whenever you strike a Path of Pain Soul Totem or a Wingsmould with your nail it will fully refill your Soul Vessel. Currently this does not work with Nail Arts. Thank you to SFGrenade for making this compatible with non vanilla Totems and Wingsmoulds
Mod.DescriptionCN: 本模组使你在痛苦之路中，用骨钉攻击灵魂图腾或翼兵时，能完全填满你的灵魂容器。目前此效果不适用于骨钉技艺。感谢SFGrenade使其兼容非原版的图腾和翼兵。

Mod.Name: Godhome Win Loss Tracker
Mod.Description: Tracks win/loss and hit stats in Hall of Gods and Pantheons.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在诸神殿堂和万神殿中追踪胜负与命中统计。

Mod.Name: Empty Menu
Mod.Description: Adds an empty menu screen.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加一个空菜单界面。

Mod.Name: Brothers of Battle
Mod.Description: fight the brothers who where trained by the great nailsage sly
Mod.DescriptionCN: 与由伟大的骨钉大师斯莱训练出的兄弟们战斗

Mod.Name: Lore Master
Mod.Description: Adds abilities to lore tablets and certain npc. Not compatible with Lore Rando! If you're only interested in the rando locations, please use Lore Randomizer instead.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为知识石碑和某些NPC添加能力。与知识随机不兼容！如果你只对随机位置感兴趣，请改用知识随机器。

Mod.Name: RandoMapMod
Mod.Description: A Randomizer 4 overhaul of the World Map to help find item and transition checks.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 对世界地图进行随机4重制，以帮助查找物品和过渡检查点。
