Mod.Name: Twister Indicator
Mod.Description: Adds a gray tint (can be customised) to your soul bar when you can use spells with the Spell Twister charm
Mod.DescriptionCN: 当装备法术扭曲者护符且可以使用法术时，为你的灵魂条添加灰色色调（可自定义）。

Mod.Name: Carefree Grimm
Mod.Description: Allows you to have Carefree Melody and Grimmchild at the same time
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你同时拥有无忧旋律和格林之子

Mod.Name: Sit Button
Mod.Description: Makes it possible to sit anywhere with a button press
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让你可以通过按下按钮在任何地方坐下

Mod.Name: CustomKnightPlus
Mod.Description: A mod that provides conditional skin support for Custom Knight
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为自定义骑士提供条件皮肤支持的模组

Mod.Name: NoSpiders
Mod.Description: A mod to remove the spiders in the foreground of deepnest
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于移除深巢前景中蜘蛛的模组。

Mod.Name: Curse Randomizer
Mod.Description: Randomizer 4 connection that adds additional cursed options.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为随机4联机添加额外的诅咒选项。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a197fe50f247; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c3622e8b5dd2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; KorzUtils

Mod.Name: NoWalkOfShame
Mod.Description: Respawns you in the room you died in (skipping darkrooms/dreamrooms/colosseum)
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在你死亡的位置房间内重生（跳过黑暗房间/梦境房间/竞技场）

Mod.Name: Always Furious
Mod.Description: Fury of the Fallen is always active while equipped
Mod.DescriptionCN: 装备后，亡者之怒始终处于激活状态。

Mod.Name: Charm Overhaul
Mod.Description: Port of Charm Overhaul to 1.5. Rebalances and reworks various Charms and adds new synergies
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将护符大修移植至1.5版本。重新平衡并重做了多种护符，并新增了协同效果。

Mod.Name: Charm Changer
Mod.Description: Lets you customize the strength of some Charm effects
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你自定义部分护符效果的强度

Mod.Name: Disable Enemy Geo
Mod.Description: Enemies no longer drop Geo
Mod.DescriptionCN: 敌人不再掉落吉欧

Mod.Name: Dream Warpers
Mod.Description: Gorb, Elder Hu, and No Eyes teleport 100% of the time after being damaged.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 戈布、长者胡和无眼在受到伤害后，100%会进行传送。

Mod.Name: GPZ Precepts
Mod.Description: GPZ displays a random precept each time he takes damage. He is invulnerable while it is displayed
Mod.DescriptionCN: 灰色王子左特每次受到伤害时都会显示一条随机箴言。显示箴言期间他处于无敌状态。

Mod.Name: Grimmchild Anywhere
Mod.Description: Grimmchild can spawn during TMG and NKG fights
Mod.DescriptionCN: 格林之子可以在格林和梦魇之王格林战斗中生成

Mod.Name: Infinite AbsRad Phases
Mod.Description: Makes the selected AbsRad phase infinite
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使选定的辐光阶段无限持续

Mod.Name: Menderbug Options
Mod.Description: Choose Menderbug's spawn chance, whether he respawns after dying, and whether the sign must be broken
Mod.DescriptionCN: 选择修理虫的生成几率、死亡后是否重生，以及是否需要打破告示牌

Mod.Name: Nailmaster's Pride
Mod.Description: Nailmaster's Glory prevents regular Nail attacks but grants all Nail Arts and automatically charges them
Mod.DescriptionCN: 骨钉大师的荣耀会阻止普通骨钉攻击，但会给予所有骨钉技艺并自动蓄力

Mod.Name: Crafted Town
Mod.Description: The Crafted Town adds a new location, several spell alternatives and some charm upgrades (on alpha as of now).
Mod.DescriptionCN: 工艺小镇添加了一个新区域、几种法术替代品以及一些护符升级（目前为Alpha版本）。
Mod.TagsCN: 扩展; 玩法; 装饰

Mod.Name: Upgraded DreamShield
Mod.Description: Turns the Dream Shield into a bow of sorts that can block lasers.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将梦之盾变成一种可以阻挡激光的弓形护盾。

Mod.Name: DreamShield Coop
Mod.Description: Mod that allows coop with a 2nd or 3rd player as a dreamshield or grimmchild clone. Support for other mods to easily add more.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许第二或第三名玩家以梦之盾或格林之子克隆体形式进行联机的模组。支持其他模组轻松添加更多内容。

Mod.Name: Boss Attacks
Mod.Description: Train boss fights in Hall of Gods against specific boss attacks and more.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在神居中对特定BOSS的攻击等进行训练。

Mod.Name: Pet
Mod.Description: Gives pets that follow the hero.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 给予跟随英雄的宠物。

Mod.Name: RCPathfinder
Mod.Description: A pathfinder library for RandomizerCore.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于随机Core的寻路库。

Mod.Name: SlantedKnight
Mod.Description: The knight is slanted depending on its HP.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 骑士会根据其生命值而倾斜。

Mod.Name: AspyCompanion
Mod.Description: Replaces Grimmchild with Aspy.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将格林之子替换为阿斯皮。

Mod.Name: Soul Nail on Heavy Blow
Mod.Description: With Heavy Blow on every 5 hits you create a sibling that sharp shadows a nearby enemy.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 装备沉重之击时，每击中5次便会创造一个锋利之影，对附近的敌人造成伤害。

Mod.Name: HKRoomLogger
Mod.Description: Logs scene transitions to a file. Companion mod to Windows-only software HKAT.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将场景切换记录到文件中。是仅限Windows的软件空洞骑士AT的配套模组。

Mod.Name: Text Randomizer
Mod.Description: Shuffles around all text in Hollow Knight
Mod.DescriptionCN: 打乱《空洞骑士》中的所有文本

Mod.Name: Disable Achievements
Mod.Description: Prevents the game from awarding achievements, both in-game and on all platforms (Steam, GoG etc.)
Mod.DescriptionCN: 阻止游戏在游戏内及所有平台（Steam、GoG等）上授予成就。

Mod.Name: TheGloryOfBeingAFoolRandomizer
Mod.Description: Randomizes the glory of being a Fool.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 随机化身为愚者的荣耀。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/b9de344dd26d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: Grass Randomizer
Mod.Description: Randomizer 4 connection that adds grass to the pool of randomized items and locations.
Mod.DescriptionCN: Randomizer 4 联动，将草地加入随机物品和位置的池子中。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e288ce6d8f08; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/bd48b449a11b; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; GrassCore

Mod.Name: GrassCore
Mod.Description: A core mod for grass-related activities.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个与草相关活动的核心模组。

Mod.Name: BingoSync
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod that automatically marks squares on bingosync.com
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，可自动标记 bingosync.com 上的方格。

Mod.Name: BingoAdvancedCustomGeneration
Mod.Description: A mod allowing for more complex board generation using BingoSync
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个允许使用宾果同步进行更复杂棋盘生成的模组

Mod.Name: BingoGoalPackGrubDay
Mod.Description: A goal pack that adds automarking for 6 new goals for the 2026 Grub Day bingy events
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个目标包，为2026年幼虫节宾果活动新增6个目标并自动标记。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/6c97fc4141f7; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/89c8567b0f8b; https://pan.quark.cn/s/1bd31bf1399d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/8e51d187eca9

Mod.Name: Soul Paladin
Mod.Description: A mod that speeds up the Soul Warrior fight and modifies it's attacks.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个加速灵魂战士战斗并修改其攻击的模组。

Mod.Name: NoBlur
Mod.Description: Clean your glasses and see Hollow Knight's background objects without blur. Options for removing Blur planes, Fog objects, and Haze objects.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 擦亮你的眼镜，看清《空洞骑士》背景物体无模糊效果。提供移除模糊平面、雾效物体和薄雾物体的选项。

Mod.Name: Keep Me Geo
Mod.Description: Don't want the anxiety of losing everything when you die? Then Keep Me Geo will take your worries away! You won't lose any more geo than you want to when you die!
Mod.DescriptionCN: 不想在死亡时承受失去一切的焦虑？那么留住吉欧将消除你的担忧！你死亡时再也不会失去超出你意愿的吉欧了！

Mod.Name: Stop Hitting Yourself
Mod.Description: The night becomes clumsy
Mod.DescriptionCN: 夜晚变得笨拙

Mod.Name: ShyKnight
Mod.Description: Removes the audience from Godhome arenas and Colosseum of Fools
Mod.DescriptionCN: 移除神居竞技场和愚人竞技场中的观众。

Mod.Name: EasySoulRefill
Mod.Description: Instantly refills your soul meter whenever you respawn, sit on a bench or enter a dream boss arena (compatible with Pale Court)
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在你重生、坐在长椅上或进入梦境BOSS战场地时，立即填充你的灵魂计量表（与苍白宫廷兼容）

Mod.Name: LessVisualNoise
Mod.Description: Reduces amount of visuals in the game for accessibility purposes. Still in development. Recommended to use along with the No Particles mod
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为无障碍目的减少游戏中的视觉效果。仍在开发中。建议与无粒子Mod一同使用。

Mod.Name: Legacy Charm Costs
Mod.Description: A mod that reverts Quick Slash and Flukenest to their older notch costs (2 notches). Offers the option to make the changes persistent on opened saves after being diabled.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个将快速劈砍和吸虫之巢恢复至旧版槽位消耗（2槽位）的模组。提供在禁用后仍能对已打开存档保持更改的选项。

Mod.Name: Static Camera
Mod.Description: Locks the camera in place with a keybind.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 通过按键锁定镜头位置。

Mod.Name: Vessel May Cry
Mod.Description: A mod that overhauls the Knight's moveset to match Vergil's. Reading the mod page is recommended.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个将骑士的动作模组重制为维吉尔风格的模组。建议阅读模组页面。

Mod.Name: AbsRad Configurable Attacks
Mod.Description: Allows configuration of Absolute Radiance's attack frequencies. Works with multiple Radiances at once.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许配置无上辐光的攻击频率。可同时作用于多个辐光。

Mod.Name: AbsRad Teleport Control
Mod.Description: Allows disabling teleport locations in the platform and final phases of the Absolute Radiance fight. Works with multiple Radiances at once.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许在无上辐光战斗的平台阶段和最终阶段禁用传送位置。可同时作用于多个辐光。

Mod.Name: Radiance Multiplier
Mod.Description: Allows fighting up to ten Absolute Radiances at once. Uses shared HP.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许同时与最多十个无上辐光战斗。共享生命值。

Mod.Name: Steady Hands (automap)
Mod.Description: Steadies the Knight's hands so they can draw while walking (updates map automatically without needing to rest at a bench). Not compatible with other map-altering mods like VanillaMapMod or RandoMapMod, which already do this.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 稳定骑士的手，使其能在行走时绘制地图（无需在长椅上休息即可自动更新地图）。与已具备此功能的其他地图修改模组（如原版地图模组或随机地图模组）不兼容。

Mod.Name: Kindred Spirit
Mod.Description: Replaces the Massive Mosscharger's statue in Godhome with a dream and non dream version of the Greenpath Vessel.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将神居中的巨型苔藓冲锋者雕像替换为苍绿之径容器的梦境与非梦境版本。

Mod.Name: Fart Knight
Mod.Description: Adds fart attack
Mod.DescriptionCN: 增加放屁攻击

Mod.Name: ImmortalLight
Mod.Description: A modboss for Absolute Radiance
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为无上辐光设计的模组BOSS

Mod.Name: LostFocus
Mod.Description: A mod that automatically pauses and mutes the game when you switch tabs.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个在切换标签页时自动暂停并静音游戏的模组。

Mod.Name: HKViz
Mod.Description: A mod that records analytics like movement, deaths, equipped charms, abilities used and much more to allows visualizing those analytics on hkviz.org
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个记录移动、死亡、装备护符、使用能力等数据的模组，以便在 hkviz.org 上可视化这些分析数据。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/e6db031c7537; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/6e10556c8b7a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/17be2f07ea73; https://pan.quark.cn/s/1bd31bf1399d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7e0fa2e54131; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c
Mod.AllDependencies: HKMirror; MapChanger; MagicUI; Satchel; Vasi; Core.FsmUtil

Mod.Name: Nightmare and Void
Mod.Description: Converts the Nightmare King Grimm fight into a custom duo boss with the Pure Vessel.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将梦魇之王格林与纯粹容器的战斗转换为自定义的双BOSS战。

Mod.Name: CarThingMod
Mod.Description: Throws a car everytime the player swings their nail
Mod.DescriptionCN: 玩家每次挥动骨钉时都会扔出一辆车。

Mod.Name: Deez Nuts Mod
Mod.Description: Replaces all text with Deez Nuts
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将所有文本替换为“Deez Nuts”

Mod.Name: CombatRandomizer
Mod.Description: A Randomizer add-on for a cursed combat experience.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为诅咒战斗体验设计的随机附加组件。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/69efa835871a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; MenuChanger; Randomizer 4; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: FlowerRandomizer
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight Randomizer add-on for flower quest lovers.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为送花任务爱好者设计的《空洞骑士》随机Mod扩展。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/688e499f64b1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; MenuChanger; Randomizer 4; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; Satchel

Mod.Name: GodhomeRandomizer
Mod.Description: A Randomizer add-on for Godhome elements.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于神居元素的随机附加组件。

Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; MenuChanger; Randomizer 4; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; Satchel

Mod.Name: GrubSpoiler
Mod.Description: A mod to add Grubs to CondensedSpoilerLog.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为CondensedSpoilerLog添加幼虫的模组。

Mod.Name: MurderRando
Mod.Description: Another rando connection for those who despise the innocent.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为那些憎恨无辜者准备的另一个随机联机模组。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c3205948c73b; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0

Mod.Name: CelesteDash
Mod.Description: Bring a Celeste-like dash system into Hollow Knight
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将类《蔚蓝》的冲刺系统引入《空洞骑士》

Mod.Name: RecentItemsDisplayNoGrass
Mod.Description: RecentItemsDisplay GrassRando notDisplay Grass
Mod.DescriptionCN: 最近物品显示 草随机 不显示草

Mod.Name: LockResolution
Mod.Description: Lock Resolution On GamePlay. VSync On LostFocus
Mod.DescriptionCN: 锁定游戏中的分辨率。失去焦点时开启垂直同步。

Mod.Name: MapSyncMod
Mod.Description: Sync Map Bench battle boss lever wall Floor door and other on ItemSyncMOD
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在物品同步模组中同步地图、长椅、战斗、BOSS、杠杆、墙壁、地板、门等内容。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/0be5014bd43d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/d8c91023fb46; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/1bd31bf1399d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7e0fa2e54131; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e04a24712d68; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemSync; Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; MultiWorldLib; MapChanger; MagicUI; Satchel

Mod.Name: BenchDeploy
Mod.Description: Deploy Multi Bench use controller/keyboard. other player bench on itemsync MapSyncMod
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使用控制器/键盘部署多个长椅。其他玩家在物品同步地图同步Mod上的长椅。

Mod.Name: MetalPipeHM
Mod.Description: A hollow knight mod that plays the metal pipe falling sound whenever the knight swings their nail.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，每当骑士挥动骨钉时，会播放金属管掉落的声音。

Mod.Name: Soul Sovereign
Mod.Description: Provides a rework to the Soul Tyrant fight to make it more challenging.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 对灵魂暴君的战斗进行重制，使其更具挑战性。

Mod.Name: LessHealing
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod that adds toggleable options that remove various healing methods from the game.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，添加了可开关的选项，用于移除游戏中的各种治疗方式。

Mod.Name: AccessRandomizer
Mod.Description: A randomizer add-on for miscellaneous access checks.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于杂项访问检查的随机器附加组件。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/5c469c88c750; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemChanger; MenuChanger; Randomizer 4; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; Satchel

Mod.Name: Moonside
Mod.Description: Yes is No and No is Yes. It makes perfect sense in Moonside.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 是即非，非即是。在月之侧，这完全说得通。

Mod.Name: UnrestrictedSteelSoul
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod that enables permadeath in dream/godhome zones when playing in steel soul mode.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，在钢铁之魂模式下，允许梦境/神居区域启用永久死亡机制。

Mod.Name: BossSync
Mod.Description: This mod is now obsolete as its features are implemented into another mod (MapSyncMod). Currently working on another mod to polish up some things for 112% Coop APB speedruns that will be released under the name "SpeedrunSync"
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组现已废弃，其功能已整合至另一个模组（地图同步模组）中。目前正在开发另一个模组，用于完善112%合作APB速通的一些内容，该模组将以“速通同步”的名称发布。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/0be5014bd43d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/d8c91023fb46; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/1bd31bf1399d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7e0fa2e54131; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0; https://pan.quark.cn/s/34276904e770
Mod.AllDependencies: ItemSync; Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi; MultiWorldLib; MapChanger; MagicUI; Satchel

Mod.Name: Afterimage Plus
Mod.Description: A mod that gives customizable afterimages to the Knight and enemies.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为骑士和敌人提供可自定义残影效果的模组。

Mod.Name: RemoveLaggyObjects
Mod.Description: Removes various objects from scenes where they can cause major lag. Also RLO
Mod.DescriptionCN: 从场景中移除可能导致严重卡顿的各种物体。简称RLO。

Mod.Name: Biblically Accurate Lasers
Mod.Description: Adds some configurable lasers to the Radiance and Absolute Radiance fights.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为辐光和无上辐光的战斗添加一些可配置的激光。

Mod.Name: FriendCore
Mod.Description: Experimental (but stable) library mod with enemy editing capabilities.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 实验性（但稳定）的库模组，具备敌人编辑功能。

Mod.Name: The H.I.V.E
Mod.Description: A mod that makes the Hive a little harder, with some new lore! Also includes the newest version of the classic modded boss Buzzbo! Playing with EnemyHPBar and HueShifter is not required, but is recommended. First part of the Hallow Knight mod series.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个让蜂巢难度略微提升的模组，并包含一些新的背景故事！同时包含经典模组BOSS Buzzbo的最新版本！建议配合EnemyHPBar和HueShifter模组游玩，但非必需。此为《圣巢骑士》模组系列的第一部分。
Mod.TagsCN: BOSS; 装饰; 扩展; 玩法

Mod.Name: DoodleBosses
Mod.Description: The culmination of the Doodle Boss project of the HKM community. All the bosses are now adorable doodles! Artist credits can be found in the Readme and in-game.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 空洞骑士M社区涂鸦BOSS项目的集大成之作。所有BOSS现在都变成了可爱的涂鸦！艺术家鸣谢请见自述文件及游戏内。

Mod.Name: CollectorGlitchRemover
Mod.Description: Prevents the "insta-grab" and "sticky feet" Collector glitches.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 防止收藏家出现“瞬间抓取”和“粘脚”Bug。

Mod.Name: Casino Knight
Mod.Description: Lets go gambling! Adds a casino with slot machines into Dirtmouth to spend geo on. Win big!
Mod.DescriptionCN: 来赌一把吧！在德特茅斯添加一个带有老虎机的赌场，用来花掉吉欧。赢大钱！

Mod.Name: Rogue
Mod.Description: A rogue-like Pantheon of Hallownest mod
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个类Rogue的圣巢万神殿模组

Mod.Name: SpellChanger
Mod.Description: A library mod that aims to allow other mods to edit spells and nail arts more easily.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个旨在让其他模组更轻松地编辑法术和骨钉技艺的库模组。

Mod.Name: ExtraSpells
Mod.Description: A mod that adds a handful of new spells and nail arts. Cycle by selecting the spell in the inventory.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个添加了若干新法术和骨钉技艺的模组。通过在物品栏中选择法术进行切换。

Mod.Name: Charm Changer Rando
Mod.Description: A mod to randomize the settings of Charm Changer
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个用于随机化护符更改器设置的模组
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/2e1b5258d1ad; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/6e10556c8b7a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/09af12e1cd3c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be
Mod.AllDependencies: Charm Changer; SFCore; WavLib; Satchel; HKMirror; Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: QuickDive
Mod.Description: A mod that remaps your Quick Cast button to only Dive
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个将快速施法按键重新映射为仅执行下砸动作的模组。

Mod.Name: Godhome Elo Counter
Mod.Description: A mod that introduces an ELO rating system to Godhome
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为神居引入 ELO 评级系统的模组

Mod.Name: Christmas In Dirtmouth
Mod.Description: Things are getting festive in Dirtmouth! This mod adds a new Christmas decoration shop in Dirtmouth owned by a new NPC, Merrywisp. Happy holidays!
Mod.DescriptionCN: 德特茅斯变得节日气氛浓厚！这个模组在德特茅斯增加了一家由新NPC“快乐微光”经营的圣诞装饰商店。节日快乐！

Mod.Name: Hivesong
Mod.Description: This mod adds a new charm, Hivesong, which increases the damage dealt by pets.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组新增了一个护符，蜂巢之歌，可提升宠物造成的伤害。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/8a4619f70d67; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/25b0e46295bb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be

Mod.Name: CharmPatch
Mod.Description: This is a collection of small changes that I think improve the balance of certain charms in the game. Please view Readme for Charm Changer mod recommendations.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 这是一个小改动合集，我认为它改善了游戏中某些护符的平衡性。请查看自述文件以获取护符更改器的模组推荐。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/6e10556c8b7a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c8c5f023c810; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/25b0e46295bb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be
Mod.AllDependencies: HKMirror; SFCore; WavLib; Satchel; DanielSteginkUtils; ItemChanger
Mod.Integrations: Charm Changer; Exaltation; Pale Court; Pale Court Charms

Mod.Name: ouchyGrass
Mod.Description: Touching grass hurts or kills the player.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 触碰草地会伤害或杀死玩家。

Mod.Name: AllHallownestEnhanced
Mod.Description: This is a mod that enhances the entire Hallownest. I spent 2.5 months to make it. It will take you to experience the joy of meeting the Hollow Knight first. I hope it can become a good meal replacement before the release of SilkSong.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 这是一个增强整个圣巢的模组。我花了2.5个月制作它。它将带你体验初次遇见空洞骑士的乐趣。希望它能成为丝之歌发布前的一道美味代餐。

Mod.Name: LumaflyKnight
Mod.Description: Tracks how many lumaflies you've freed
Mod.DescriptionCN: 追踪你已释放的萤火虫数量

Mod.Name: FasterIntroSkip
Mod.Description: Makes skipping the intro cutscenes faster.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 使跳过开场动画的速度更快。

Mod.Name: Screensaver
Mod.Description: Adds a screensaver untop of the game.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在游戏上方添加一个屏幕保护程序。

Mod.Name: GrubFriendlyRando
Mod.Description: Changes the grub shop description to "a cute little wiggly friend!"
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将幼虫商店的描述改为“一个可爱的小扭扭朋友！”

Mod.Name: TextMasher
Mod.Description: Auto mashes through textboxes if you are holding Nail, Jump or Focus.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 按住骨钉、跳跃或聚焦键时自动跳过文本框。

Mod.Name: BossStatueFramework
Mod.Description: Library for adding custom boss statues to the Hall of Gods.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于在诸神堂中添加自定义BOSS雕像的库。

Mod.Name: SpeedChanger
Mod.Description: Speed up or slow down your game. A more customisable and user-friendly version of the Sanic mod.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 加快或减慢你的游戏速度。一个比Sanic模组更具可定制性和用户友好性的版本。

Mod.Name: GearSwitcher
Mod.Description: A modification that allows you to switch the prepared equipment patterns, as well as switch the charms at any time.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个允许你切换预设装备配置，并随时更换护符的模组。

Mod.Name: ReplayLogger
Mod.Description: ReplayLoger is a mod that was created to verify the legitimacy of player challenge runs.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 回放记录器是一个用于验证玩家挑战跑合法性的模组。

Mod.Name: GodhomeQoL
Mod.Description: This mod is a large collection of tools designed to help challenge runners with their tasks.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 本模组是一个大型工具合集，旨在帮助挑战速通玩家完成任务。

Mod.Name: HKBattle
Mod.Description: HKBattle is a Hollow Knight mod for solo practice and competitive boss and Pantheon challenges.
Mod.DescriptionCN: HKBattle 是一个《空洞骑士》模组，用于单人练习以及 BOSS 和万神殿的竞技挑战。

Mod.Name: Fishing
Mod.Description: Adds a fishing minigame to the randomizer
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为随机模式增加一个钓鱼小游戏
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/b290dde4d14f; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: RomanNumerals
Mod.Description: Converts all numbers to the Roman numeral system
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将所有数字转换为罗马数字系统

Mod.Name: DivineFury
Mod.Description: This mod adds a new charm: Divine Fury. This charm sets the player's health to 1, allowing Fury of the Fallen to be viable in Radiant Godhome battles.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 本模组添加了一个新护符：神圣之怒。该护符将玩家的生命值设为1，使亡者之怒能够在辐辉级神居战斗中生效。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/654f6d6eb8e2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/25b0e46295bb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be

Mod.Name: Silksong-Start-Screen
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod that replaces the game's title screen with a Silksong-themed start screen. Currently, this version only replaces the logo and does not replace the background—mainly due to the lack of high-quality resources. For the best visual match, it's recommended to use the Grimm background.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，将游戏标题界面替换为丝之歌主题的启动界面。目前该版本仅替换了标志，未替换背景——主要原因是缺乏高质量资源。为获得最佳视觉效果，建议使用格林背景。

Mod.Name: RandoMapCore
Mod.Description: A library for RandoMapMod and ArchipelagoMapMod.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于随机地图模组和群岛地图模组的库。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/471ac29689fe; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/1bd31bf1399d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7e0fa2e54131; https://pan.quark.cn/s/32577894ddb4; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9347f5539823; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: ConnectionMetadataInjector; ItemChanger; MagicUI; MapChanger; Satchel; Vasi; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; RCPathfinder

Mod.Name: Smart Nail
Mod.Description: Qol mod for RandoPlus,which auto-upgrades your nail in Godhome and in dream bosses fights.Doesn't work with combat or curse rando.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为RandoPlus设计的生活质量模组，可在神居和梦境BOSS战中自动升级你的骨钉。不适用于战斗或诅咒随机模式。

Mod.Name: Pure Vessel Skills
Mod.Description: Allow you to use Pure Vessel's attacks
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你使用纯粹容器的攻击

Mod.Name: Zen Charm
Mod.Description: Adds a Charm that allows you to change other charms while not at a bench
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加一个护符，允许你在非长椅处更换其他护符。

Mod.Name: Silksong Healing
Mod.Description: Adds a charm called Soulburst, which allows players to heal 3 masks at once when they have 99 soul, similar to Silksong
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加一个名为“灵魂爆发”的护符，当玩家拥有99点灵魂时，可以一次性回复3格面具血量，类似于《丝之歌》中的机制。

Mod.Name: Mask Remover
Mod.Description: Removes masks from the HUD. Useful for radiant fights.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 从HUD中移除面具。适用于辐光级战斗。

Mod.Name: Geo Remover
Mod.Description: Removes geo icons from the HUD.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 从HUD中移除吉欧图标。

Mod.Name: Invulnerability Indicator
Mod.Description: Adds a visual indicator when the player character is invulnerable outside of screen transitions, invincibility, and invulnerability that is already visually indicated.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在玩家角色处于屏幕切换、无敌状态以及已有视觉提示的无敌状态之外时，添加一个视觉指示器。

Mod.Name: Collision Glitch Remover
Mod.Description: Removes collision-based glitches such as the Gruz mother wall bounce and Collector "sticky feet" glitch. Works the same way as CollectorGlitchRemover except it fixes every scene. Can be added along with CollectorGlitchRemover or instead of CollectorGlitchRemover.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 移除基于碰撞的故障，例如格鲁兹之母的墙壁反弹和收藏家的“粘脚”故障。其工作方式与收藏家故障移除器相同，但会修复所有场景。可以与收藏家故障移除器一同添加，或替代收藏家故障移除器。

Mod.Name: RainbowShinies
Mod.Description: Makes all shinies have a random color
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让所有闪亮物品呈现随机颜色

Mod.Name: ArchitectLegacy
Mod.Description: The old version of Architect, a Hollow Knight level editor.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 《空洞骑士》关卡编辑器的旧版本。

Mod.Name: Architect
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight level editor mod, easily make and share custom levels with an in-game level editor and level sharer.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一款《空洞骑士》关卡编辑器模组，通过游戏内关卡编辑器和分享功能，轻松制作并分享自定义关卡。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/ca26700203d3; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/0c53a9e15303; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be
Mod.AllDependencies: Satchel; FsmMaster; ItemChanger; ItemCreator; SFCore; WavLib

Mod.Name: ItemCreator
Mod.Description: Library used to create custom items that show up in the inventory.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于创建自定义物品并显示在物品栏中的库。

Mod.Name: FsmSeer
Mod.Description: Shows active FSM names and states above objects when F3 is pressed.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 按下F3时，在物体上方显示活跃的有限状态机名称和状态。

Mod.Name: UltimateChickenKnight
Mod.Description: Ultimate Chicken Horse in Hollow Knight, using HKMP and the Architect mod.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在《空洞骑士》中玩《终极鸡马》，使用空洞骑士多人联机与建筑师模组。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/33dd863bc7db; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ca26700203d3; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/4be9d1ccef2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/0c53a9e15303; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be
Mod.AllDependencies: Architect; Satchel; FsmMaster; ItemChanger; ItemCreator; SFCore; WavLib; HKMP

Mod.Name: ConfigurableMaskDamage
Mod.Description: Changes the amount of damage dealt to the knight
Mod.DescriptionCN: 改变对骑士造成的伤害量

Mod.Name: ExaltationExpanded
Mod.Description: A fan-made supplement to the Exaltation mod created by Xhuis (and ported/updated by Théodore).
Mod.DescriptionCN: 由Xhuis制作的升华模组的粉丝补充内容（由Théodore移植/更新）。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/6e10556c8b7a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/445ab316e0f2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/04f609da24a8; https://pan.quark.cn/s/25b0e46295bb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be
Mod.AllDependencies: Exaltation; HKMirror; Satchel; SFCore; WavLib; DanielSteginkUtils; ItemChanger
Mod.Integrations: Pale Court; Pale Court Charms; MoreMasks; Charm Changer; Carefree Grimm

Mod.Name: CustomizableAbilities
Mod.Description: Mod that allows you to customize abilities: negative and fractional nail; the amount of SOUL received from nail hits; nail cooldown; damage (also negative and fractional) and the amount of SOUL received from dream nail; spells and other abilities. Negative damage heals enemies.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 该模组允许你自定义能力：负数和分数骨钉；骨钉击中获得的灵魂量；骨钉冷却时间；伤害（同样支持负数和分数）以及梦之钉获得的灵魂量；法术和其他能力。负伤害会治疗敌人。
Mod.TagsCN: 玩法; 工具; 扩展

Mod.Name: QoLTeleportKit
Mod.Description: QoL Teleport Kit is a Hollow Knight mod that adds a convenient teleportation system.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 生活质量传送套件是一个《空洞骑士》模组，添加了一个便捷的传送系统。

Mod.Name: WanderersWisdom
Mod.Description: A mod that adds 2 new charms: Wanderer's Wisdom and Wanderer's Guile.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个添加了2个新护符的模组：流浪者智慧和流浪者诡计。

Mod.Name: DashChanger
Mod.Description: Allows you to change the horizontal and vertical length of the dash.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你更改冲刺的水平与垂直距离。

Mod.Name: PlatformingQoL
Mod.Description: Quality of life improvements for Hollow Knight platforming, including hitbox visualization and respawn animation skipping.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为《空洞骑士》的平台跳跃提供生活质量改进，包括判定框可视化与跳过重生动画。

Mod.Name: ShowHPOnDeath
Mod.Description: A mod that allows you to watch hp after death
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个允许你在死亡后查看血量的模组。

Mod.Name: OWO_HollowKnight
Mod.Description: A mod that allows the integration of OWO Skin haptic device with HK
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个允许将 OWO 皮肤触觉设备与《空洞骑士》集成的模组。

Mod.Name: EnchantedMask
Mod.Description: Adds new powerups called Glyphs, which can be purchased from the Mask maker.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加名为“符文”的新强化道具，可从面具制作师处购买。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13dee9d6ab23; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/61ee7a8f56cd; https://pan.quark.cn/s/25b0e46295bb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be
Mod.AllDependencies: Satchel; ItemChanger; SFCore; WavLib; DebugMod; DanielSteginkUtils

Mod.Name: MetalOST
Mod.Description: Replaces all of Hallownest’s OST’s with custom metal variants made by RYS.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将圣巢的所有原声带替换为由RYS制作的定制金属变体。

Mod.Name: DPSMeter
Mod.Description: Mod that allows you to see how much damage you deal per second. Also works with negative damage.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你查看每秒造成多少伤害的模组。也适用于负伤害。

Mod.Name: Pale Court Charms
Mod.Description: Adds charms from Pale Court. Made to allow compatibility with mods that don't work with the main Pale Court. Works with Randomizer and Transcendence. Do not use with Pale Court,as both mods add the same charms.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加苍白宫廷中的护符。旨在与不兼容主苍白宫廷的模组配合使用。可与随机和超越模组兼容。请勿与苍白宫廷同时使用，因为两个模组会添加相同的护符。

Mod.Name: HKMP.VoiceChat
Mod.NameCN: 空洞骑士多人联机.语音聊天
Mod.Description: An HKMP addon that adds (proximity) voice chat. Requires OpenAL (https://www.openal.org/) to be installed.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个为空洞骑士多人联机添加（近距离）语音聊天的扩展。需要安装OpenAL（https://www.openal.org/）。

Mod.Name: MotionBlur
Mod.Description: Adds motion blur
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加运动模糊效果

Mod.Name: Less Flashing Lights
Mod.Description: Reduces the amount of flashing lights. Check the readme for more info
Mod.DescriptionCN: 减少闪烁灯光的数量。查看自述文件以获取更多信息。

Mod.Name: Galien Illusionist
Mod.Description: Modboss. Now there will be two galiens in the arena, one of which is not real.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 模组BOSS。现在竞技场中将出现两个加利安，其中一个并非实体。

Mod.Name: DanielSteginkUtils
Mod.Description: Custom library with calculations, logic and cross-mod helpers.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 包含计算、逻辑和跨模组辅助功能的自定义库。

Mod.Name: PantheonOfRegions
Mod.Description: Adds new Pantheon to fight bosses together
Mod.DescriptionCN: 新增一个万神殿，可同时与多个BOSS战斗

Mod.Name: Powerful Shadow Dash
Mod.Description: This mod set shadow dash cooltime to 0.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组将暗影冲刺的冷却时间设置为0。

Mod.Name: Custom Title
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod that allows players to use their custom title
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个允许玩家使用自定义标题的《空洞骑士》模组。

Mod.Name: Nail Destroy Bullet
Mod.Description: Swinging the nail will destroy enemies' bullet.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 挥动骨钉将摧毁敌人的子弹。

Mod.Name: Dash Slash Plus
Mod.Description: Removes the charge requirement for Dash Slash.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 移除冲刺劈砍的蓄力要求。

Mod.Name: Shade Lord
Mod.Description: Adds the Shade Lord as a boss in the Hall of Gods
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在诸神殿堂中增加暗影之主作为BOSS。

Mod.Name: Killable Dreamnail
Mod.Description: Add a charm called "Serrated Dream" which allows you to deal damage with dream nail, the damage is depend on the essence you have
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加一个名为“锯齿梦境”的护符，允许你使用梦之钉造成伤害，伤害取决于你所拥有的精华数量

Mod.Name: More Charm Notches
Mod.Description: Doubles the number of charm notches you have, so that you start wih 6 instead of 3, and every additional charm notch item you find will give you an extra 2 notches.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将你拥有的护符槽位数量翻倍，因此你一开始会有6个槽位而非3个，并且你找到的每个额外护符槽位物品都会给你额外2个槽位。

Mod.Name: Uneated Grubs
Mod.Description: Keeps the Grubs in Grubhome without Grubfather eating them.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 让幼虫之家中的幼虫保持原样，不被幼虫父亲吃掉。

Mod.Name: Hide Dialog Text
Mod.Description: Toggle dialog text's visibility by pressing F3. May remove in the future as it is porting to DebugMod
Mod.DescriptionCN: 按F3切换对话文本的可见性。未来可能会移除，因为该功能正在移植到调试模组中

Mod.Name: MarkothShield
Mod.Description: This mod upgrades the Dreamshield into the Markoth Shield.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组将梦之盾升级为马科斯之盾。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/dee3205a06f3; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/25b0e46295bb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be

Mod.Name: AlwaysHazardRespawn
Mod.Description: Always respawn at hazard respawn locations after death.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 死亡后总是在危险重生点复活。

Mod.Name: LaughMod
Mod.Description: Plays laugh sound on specific events.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在特定事件发生时播放笑声。

Mod.Name: Fast World
Mod.Description: Making your Hallownest more challenging by changing speed of the entire world, except you!
Mod.DescriptionCN: 通过改变整个圣巢的速度（不包括你），让你的圣巢更具挑战性。

Mod.Name: GeoPots
Mod.Description: Adds a chance for carts and barrels to drop geo when broken.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 增加推车和木桶被打破时掉落吉欧的几率。

Mod.Name: GeoBundles
Mod.Description: Store Geo in "bundles" to protect it from loss upon death, similar to rosary strings in silksong.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 将吉欧存储在“捆”中，以防止死亡时丢失，类似于《丝之歌》中的念珠串。

Mod.Name: BetterCrystalHeart
Mod.Description: Adds synergies and bonuses to Crystal Heart's damage and charge time.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为水晶之心的伤害和蓄力时间增加协同效果与加成。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/c36e26fd2fcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/6e10556c8b7a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/25b0e46295bb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be
Mod.AllDependencies: DanielSteginkUtils; SFCore; WavLib; ItemChanger; Satchel; HKMirror

Mod.Name: InfectedHallownest
Mod.Description: Adds a new stage to the game: after beating the Hollow Knight, the Infection expands throughout the game, strengthening enemies at random.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为游戏增加一个新阶段：击败空洞骑士后，瘟疫会扩散至整个游戏，随机强化敌人。

Mod.Name: Restore NKG Title Card
Mod.NameCN: 恢复梦魇之王格林标题卡
Mod.Description: Restore Godhome NKG Title Card
Mod.DescriptionCN: 恢复神居中的梦魇之王格林标题卡

Mod.Name: RandoSBRCO
Mod.Description: Adds logic to the randomizer to ensure that a given charm order can be followed
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为随机器添加逻辑，确保给定的护符顺序可以遵循。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0; https://pan.quark.cn/s/5f515f5d8e10
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: GodhomeGeo
Mod.Description: Removes the limitation that prevents geo from spawning in Godhome.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 移除神居中阻止吉欧生成的限制。

Mod.Name: ShadeSnail
Mod.Description: Spawns an immortal Shade that follows you constantly.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 生成一只不朽的暗影，持续跟随你。

Mod.Name: GripWall
Mod.Description: Reduces or eliminates gravity effect while clinging to a wall.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 减少或消除攀附墙壁时的重力效果。

Mod.Name: AllGrubRewardsAtOnce
Mod.NameCN: 全部幼虫奖励一次领取
Mod.Description: Grubfather gives all available rewards in one go.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 虫爷爷一次性给予所有可用奖励。

Mod.Name: Nosk Transformation
Mod.Description: Become Nosk at will—roar, spit, leap, and prank your friends in Hollow Knight, with stealth naming and HKMP support.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 随心所欲地变成诺斯克——在《空洞骑士》中咆哮、吐息、跳跃、恶搞你的朋友，支持隐身命名和空洞骑士多人联机。

Mod.Name: NoMaps
Mod.Description: Removes the map from the screen
Mod.DescriptionCN: 从屏幕上移除地图

Mod.Name: CabbyCodes
Mod.Description: A comprehensive cheat menu mod that provides control over player stats, inventory, and game state through an in-game interface
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一款综合性作弊菜单模组，通过游戏内界面提供对玩家属性、物品栏和游戏状态的控制。

Mod.Name: NoGlow
Mod.Description: Toggles the faint glow that follows the Knight around.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 切换跟随骑士的微弱光芒。

Mod.Name: Drunk Knight
Mod.Description: Add a sin and chromatic aberration effect to the camera
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为摄像机添加污渍和色差效果

Mod.Name: DistantGreens Charms
Mod.Description: Adds some custom Charms into the Hollow Knight.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为《空洞骑士》添加一些自定义护符。

Mod.Name: ProfanityFilterAddon
Mod.Description: Server-side profanity filter addon for HKMP and SSMP. currently uses a high-performance rule-based filtering engine.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 用于空洞骑士MP和SSMP的服务端脏话过滤器附加组件。目前使用高性能的基于规则的过滤引擎。

Mod.Name: ExtraNotchesForExtraCharms
Mod.Description: This mod adds extra charm notches based on how many mod charms you have installed.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 此模组会根据你安装的模组护符数量增加额外的护符槽位。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c6b000fe5b93; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/25b0e46295bb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be

Mod.Name: VoidAndSoul
Mod.Description: This mod adds an RPG mechanic through the 0-notch charm Void & Soul.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 本模组通过0槽位护符“虚空与灵魂”增加了一项RPG机制。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/37a6914e4fcd; https://pan.quark.cn/s/25b0e46295bb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be

Mod.Name: Double Bosses
Mod.Description: A mod that (as the name suggests) doubles each bosses (actually, only bottom row in hall of gods + PV, NG, AR, WKs). "Enjoy" the mayhem and chaos this mod provides
Mod.DescriptionCN: A mod that (as the name suggests) doubles each bosses (actually, only bottom row in hall of gods + PV, NG, AR, WKs). "Enjoy" the mayhem and chaos this mod provides

Mod.Name: MuteBosses
Mod.Description: Silences bosses via toggles in the menu
Mod.DescriptionCN: 通过菜单中的开关使BOSS静音

Mod.Name: DreamNailRadiance
Mod.Description: Enables you to use the Dream Nail against the Radiance (her legs, specifically)
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你对辐光使用梦之钉（具体来说是她的腿）

Mod.Name: SpamDescendingDark
Mod.Description: Increases DDark invincibility so it can be used non-stop
Mod.DescriptionCN: 增加黑暗降临的无敌时间，使其可以连续使用

Mod.Name: FuryOfTheBallin
Mod.Description: Charm spawns Marmu ally when you are at 1 Mask; must beat Marmu to unlock
Mod.DescriptionCN: 当你只有1点面具时，护符会召唤马穆作为盟友；必须击败马穆才能解锁。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/82992a6251e1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/c08ffdc90dcb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/ed0131e73024; https://pan.quark.cn/s/25b0e46295bb; https://pan.quark.cn/s/13b9de2767be

Mod.Name: SyncDreamShield
Mod.Description: Syncs your Dream Shield with other players in HKMP
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在空洞骑士多人联机中与其他玩家同步你的梦之盾

Mod.Name: MendBreakables
Mod.Description: Repairs certain breakable objects
Mod.DescriptionCN: 修复某些可破坏的物体

Mod.Name: AuraRad
Mod.Description: Absolute Radiance Mod Boss
Mod.DescriptionCN: 无上辐光模组 BOSS

Mod.Name: ResurrectionMod
Mod.Description: Adds a downed state instead of death, allowing teammates to revive you in HKMP. Features a configurable Force Respawn key.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 新增倒地状态替代死亡，允许队友在空洞骑士多人联机中复活你。包含可配置的强制重生键。

Mod.Name: Vietnamese Lang
Mod.Description: Add Vietnamese Language. Hollow Knight Việt Hoá
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加越南语支持。空洞骑士越化版

Mod.Name: SpriteToggler
Mod.Description: Toggles sprites on objects defined in the settings (single "OC Backboard" by default) on F10 (configurable). You can find object names using Unity Explorer
Mod.DescriptionCN: 在F10键（可配置）上切换设置中定义的对象的精灵图（默认单个“OC背板”）。你可以使用Unity资源浏览器查找对象名称。

Mod.Name: EdgeDetection
Mod.Description: An accessibility mod that adds customizable edge detection outlines to things that are important for gameplay.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一款无障碍模组，可为游戏玩法中的重要元素添加可自定义的边缘检测轮廓。

Mod.Name: Charm Loadouts
Mod.Description: Allows you to save and load up to 3 charm builds while resting at a bench.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 允许你在长椅上休息时保存并加载最多3套护符配置。

Mod.Name: RngSync
Mod.Description: A Hollow Knight mod that makes a lot of RNG deterministic
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，使大量随机数变得可预测。

Mod.Name: Charm Rebalanced
Mod.Description: Click [View Readme] to see all the changes. If you enjoy the mod, please consider giving the GitHub repository a star, this will help spread the mod to more people!
Mod.DescriptionCN: 点击[查看说明]以查看所有改动。如果您喜欢这个模组，请考虑在GitHub仓库上点个星标，这将帮助该模组传播给更多人！

Mod.Name: Charmforging
Mod.Description: Add even more interesting charms to Hollow Knight world
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为《空洞骑士》的世界添加更多有趣的护符

Mod.Name: Noclip Accuracy
Mod.Description: A lightweight mod that tracks how many spike damage hits you take during noclip / practice runs
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一个轻量级模组，用于追踪你在穿墙/练习过程中受到多少次尖刺伤害。

Mod.Name: Ghost Macro
Mod.Description: Scene-based hitbox recording and replay system with timeline playback, multi-visit support, and macro-like ghost replays
Mod.DescriptionCN: 基于场景的判定框录制与回放系统，支持时间轴播放、多轮访问以及类似宏的幽灵回放

Mod.Name: Spell Counter
Mod.Description: Spell counter mod with many modes: Spells, Casual and Chain Shorogos
Mod.DescriptionCN: 法术计数器模组，包含多种模式：法术、休闲和连锁修洛戈斯

Mod.Name: RespawnPoint Manager
Mod.Description: Spawnpoint manager that tracks, saves, and switches player checkpoints across scene with quick reset and custom spawn control
Mod.DescriptionCN: 重生点管理器，可追踪、保存和切换玩家在不同场景中的检查点，支持快速重置和自定义重生控制

Mod.Name: Hallowest
Mod.Description: Hardcore gameplay overhaul mod for Hollow Knight. Increases difficulty and rebalances combat.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 《空洞骑士》的硬核玩法大修模组。提升难度并重新平衡战斗。

Mod.Name: DynamicRenderScale
Mod.Description: Dynamically adjusts render scale based on performance.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 根据性能动态调整渲染缩放。

Mod.Name: HarderAPSettings
Mod.Description: Adds Settings to make APs harder, like take extra damage, do less nail damage, and replaces Radiance with AbsRad. Works in non Archipelago saves too.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 添加设置以使AP更难，例如承受额外伤害、降低骨钉伤害，并将辐光替换为无上辐光。也适用于非Archipelago存档。

Mod.Name: WhatTheMoth
Mod.Description: A Simon Says-inspired Hollow Knight mod where obeying Judge Radiance sends you straight to the Radiance arena, MOD IS IN SPANISH BY THE WAY.
Mod.DescriptionCN: 一款受《西蒙说》启发的《空洞骑士》模组，服从审判官辐光会将你直接传送到辐光的竞技场，顺便一提，本模组是西班牙语的。

Mod.Name: Another Location
Mod.Description: Adds one location to the Randomizer. Terms and Conditions may apply
Mod.DescriptionCN: 为随机Mod增加一个地点。可能需遵守条款与条件。
Mod.QLinks: https://pan.quark.cn/s/3a7f95b32197; https://pan.quark.cn/s/a0014b6875b2; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9d8ed7e02b5c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/65f5861249d1; https://pan.quark.cn/s/9b529e894a6a; https://pan.quark.cn/s/64d7ed15fab5; https://pan.quark.cn/s/e3054eca2f2c; https://pan.quark.cn/s/7ab0a9ba9d2d; https://pan.quark.cn/s/313f3d778ed0
Mod.AllDependencies: Randomizer 4; ItemChanger; MenuChanger; RandomizerCore; RandomizerCore.Json; Benchwarp; QoL; Vasi

Mod.Name: FsmMaster
Mod.Description: Visual FSM graph inspection and live editing for PlayMaker FSMs
Mod.DescriptionCN: PlayMaker有限状态机的可视化图形检查与实时编辑
